reviews.title: Great cat food & Customer Service
reviews.review_text:
I have 3 cats. 1 older lady who doesn't appreciate any form of change. 
Then I have 2 very fussy young lady’s who I had tried every food. Bartie my baby would just lick the gravy then top up with kitten biscuits.
Since introducing her to MARRO at meal times, she all but somersaults round my kitchen. Standing on hind legs reaching for her plate. Truly best food ever. Warm it in m/wave 15 secs really helps. Another bonus NO disgusting smell.  Customer service no matter what day of the week they are right there with you to offer help. Delivery service is extremely prompt no delays. 
I truly recommend MARRO cat food to my other cat loving friends. Thank you for caring for our cats.

reviews.title: Website wouldn't let me in, but it turned out to be my fault in the end.
reviews.review_text:
Any issue we had, (with the website, not with the food), was promptly taken care of on Marro's end without asking me to jump through hoops.  They seem really kind and as if they are people who care about cats.
Our cat loves her Marro so much, she now turns her nose up at any other brand purported to be "all natural". She has become more energetic and stronger, bounding up & down the stairs, instead of going one at a time as she did when we first found her battered, bruised and abused.

reviews.title: 5 Stars from Charlie :star2::star2::star2::star2::star2:
reviews.review_text: Amazing customer service and a really straight forward sign-up process. Charlie (ex stray) was previously extremely fussy so I was apprehensive about trying Marro. He dove straight in and now follows me into the kitchen every time I pass hoping for extra! The food smells amazing, so I really don’t blame him :smirk_cat:

reviews.title: Didnt like at the begining but likes after 2 months
reviews.review_text:
My cat just turned 3 years old. So, i thought of trying something diferent as hecwas becoming too choosy and there was no diversity in his diet. I had tried just about everything. When I first introduced Marro he didn't really like, at the beginning.  He became moody and playing rough -I think he was hungry as he looked thiner. Took him to the vet and all was okay. 
I then alternate Marro with his other long term feed ( sea food encore). That, worked better. Now, he enjoyes Marro meat, pork and succulent chicken flavours (interestingly) but, strangely he is not too keen on the fish, salmon flavours. But im happy to keep trying. 

I didn't have many concerns but was aware that trying other flavour, diferent from  sea food encore, would be a good for him.
reviews.category: Took a While But Now Love It
categories: Took a While But Now Love It

reviews.title: What amazing food
reviews.review_text: What amazing food! I have 5 fussy ragdolls and they all love Marro. Bowls are clean every time. Their conditions have improved so much in the few months of being on Marro. Its a food I will definitely recommend

reviews.title: Excellent quality food and customer service
reviews.review_text:
If like me you’re a bit of a sceptic kept seeing adverts for Marro on social media and kept putting it off, thinking is it really that good? …. I can honestly say it IS that GOOD!
If my cat could write this review I’m sure he would be giving them 10 out of 10.
 My indoor Mainecoon cat is a bit of a lazy one, but since eating Marro he’s been more active, and very kitten like which is fantastic to see. His coat is so soft and silky and his poops are so much better. I love how the food sachets are the portion size needed for each meal which makes life so much easier. It’s looks great and smells good too, I warm up a sachet in a jug with some hot water for a couple of minutes so it’s nice and warm for him just as he likes it. The bowl is always emptied quickly and looks sparkling clean afterwards, you wouldn’t know he had any food in it.
My cat loves the food and goes quite mad for it, he chats away at me as if telling me to hurry up as he can’t wait for his Marro.
I’m so pleased I tried their food and I highly recommend you try it too, as it’s made a huge difference to my cats overall health.
I am going to be totally transparent that I have had a couple of issues with my order but it has been quickly resolved by their customer service team. I’m super impressed with their customer service, it’s honestly one of the best I have come across. I think a lot of companies could learn a thing or two from Marro.
I am so confident in them and their food that I am now a regular customer, and my cat gives them his seal of approval too.
Highly recommend trying Marro for your cat.
reviews.category: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits

My 2 1/2 year old cat Bartholomeow MJ the great loves his food
He has the chicken, turkey and the duck ones (he doesn’t like fish of any kind and never has but he did try it) 
He is a very fussy eater and has never been a food driven cat (he just likes to play mainly) but he will stop to eat his marro so we are both happy with it 
I don’t find it expensive compared to buying so many different foods and them going to waste when he doesn’t touch them then having to buy something else, I know he likes this so it’s one payment every month 
He did have another subscription food before this but the recipe changed and he no longer liked it 
It has a nice amount of juice but I always add water for his kidneys and he still loves it

reviews.title: I could not recommend enough :clap::clap::clap::clap:
reviews.review_text: I have been buying marro for over six months and what a diference. My cats look healthy, happy with beautiful fur and clean teeth. I cannot express enough how important it is to feed your animal proper food. What you safe on buying crap food, you pay on big vet bills when your cat gets ill. Before they would often be sick when they were eating royal canin. Since I changed to marro all the health problems stops. The only issue is that they love the food so much they want to eat more and more. I also want to say thanks to marro for their excellent customer service, they are absolutely lovely and really try to help when you need something. In this day and age where companies are replacing customer service for ai, it is really lovely when you encounter a company that really cares about human contact. I sooooo recommend Marro for their food, I promise that like me you will never look back once your cat is eating proper food.

reviews.title: The App is really easy to manage and if…
reviews.review_text: The App is really easy to manage and if you do need to speak to staff they are very helpful.  Bo loves all the food except fish. But now I know that it was easy to remove from the order.  Super flexible on delivery.

reviews.review_text: Great communication, easy ordering- I was worried about signing up to a subscription but this can be cancelled or orders postponed very easily so very easy to manage. Our cat loves the food too- good quality proper meat that she shouts for every meal time.

reviews.title: Nova has a happy and full tummy!
reviews.review_text: I had 2 cats, Nova and Handsome, until May last year when Handsome sadly passed. Both my cats were fed the typical shop brought cat foods. It wasn't until Handsome passed I realised how little Nova was eating (clearly Handsome was eating her leftovers) and how much food was being left in her bowl not touched. I thought she was just going through a phase and I needed to change the brand. I did this 3 times and still, she would only eat the jelly or lick up the gravy. So I started looking for a fresh food alternative and came across Marrow. This was in October. Got my first delivery and was nervous, this is more expensive than shop brought food, what if it's going to be a complete waste of money. I shouldn't have worried! From the first bowl I put down she gobbled down the lot! I then become nervous she was going to go off it in a couple of months. Wrong again! We are 7 months in and she is still clearing every bowl. She even nows rubs round my legs when I'm dishing up which she has never done. I always thought she was a chicken lover, turns out her favourite is the pork! She also looks so much healthier. She's naturally a small cat but now she doesn't look scrawny anymore and her coat is definitely thicker and shinier. I am.so glad I have found Marro and my baby has a happy, full tummy. I would 100% recommend Marro.
reviews.category: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits

reviews.title: Best cat food you will ever buy
reviews.review_text:
After living for 40+ years in a multi-cat household, this is the best food around. Save your money- your beloved furry beasts will go off all the other cat food at some point. Marro is the only brand ours will eat consistently; we've been giving it to them for a couple of years now after they kept turning their noses up at everything else. It's obviously very good quality from the smell, texture and looks but the proof is always a clean bowl. 
6 cats have now got glossy, healthy coats. Fewer dental problems. Bright eyes. Extremely happy and energetic. And even the sickly kitten with the chronic fragile stomach is thriving- the healthy dollops in my flower bed are testament!
Website is very easy to use and I love that they give you a reminder of when your next box is due so you can budget for it or amend the portions/ flavours.
Customer service is very good too. Just pop them an email and they reply promptly and friendly. No robots at all!
Would (and have) recommended to anyone with a feline of any age.
reviews.category: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits

He takes some time to adjust to the different flavours and adding some of his dry food to it helps to encourage him to try it but he eats his fresh food so quickly and he’s such a happy boy. So pleased we got the trial for a selection of flavours and I’m happy to keep him on fresh food from now moving forward. The deliveries come well packaged with ice blocks to keep the freshness of the food and the website is easy enough to navigate to make your orders and amend order dates. Just wish there was an app to access our account. Thank you Marro!

reviews.title: Highly recommend , cats love it.
reviews.review_text:
Most importantly , ny cats love Marro. Ivw been buying it for a year now and they still enjoy it. 
Because its mostly meat (unlike supermarket packet food)  they do not need any where near as many packets per day. So although it seems a bit more expensive it works out cheaper. Im sure its healthier yoo as not so many added fillers. 
As for ordering and delivery its excellent . You can choose,  chop and change your cats menu each time and same with delivery date. It arrives always on time,  well packaged in ice packs and a lovely  box  and jow and again they through in a cute little cat toy .  Highly recommend. 
P s  cats poop dosnt smell so bad on Marro either.

I just love the whole experience, quality and people and cat friendly care received from Marro and it shows that they care both about their product and producing the best for our fur babies.  No more food in the bin or wasted money . Happy cat and happy cat mum.. thank you . I would recommend Marro for a happy cat a d a happy cat parent :heart_eyes_cat:

reviews.title: A wonderful food for my cat
reviews.review_text: My cat really enjoys all his meals and he licks his bowl clean. The texture, freshness and smell are amazing. He is usually a fussy eater but not with his Marro. The meals look appealing and smell soo much better than other cat foods I tried. The staff are all friendly, reliable, and care about your furry family member which is very important. The food is human food with everything a cat needs. So very happy but Smokie is very happy and contented so thankyou Marro would highly recommend you x

reviews.title: Great food, great service
reviews.review_text:
As my senior cat Dudley seemed to be losing a little weight & had no health issues when vet-checked, I decided to try him on a new diet as he obviously wasn't getting the nutrition he needed. After some online research, I decided to give Marro a try. 
Our trial box (& every subsequent one) arrived  exactly on schedule with dpd.
As Dudley has a healthy appetite I decided to just give him a whole (gently warmed) pouch without the gradual introduction Marro recommended. He cleared the first bowl no problem. Every subsequent meal has had the same result, he really enjoys all the flavours. 1 month in his weight stabilised, 2 months in he had regained his lost weight & looks like his old self again. 
Marro account is easy to manage. As I did for Dudley, you can easily change the meal plan if needed (I only did it to balance out the flavours so he gets maximum variation), & if you need to alter delivery date to suit, its very straightforward to do too. 
The meals arrive well-packed in insulated box with an ice-pack inside. Just open, separate the pouches, put a few days meals in the fridge & the rest in the freezer .... simples!
Highly recommend Marro for good quality meals & great service
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's high-quality meals helped their senior cat regain lost weight and return to full health within two months of switching to the new diet.

I now have a subscription for monthly delivery, and changing the content each month is easy via the website, and it arrives spot on time each month.
Freddie has been having Marro for a few months now and seems much more content, his coat is better, and his sensitive tummy has settled right down.
In summary, I can highly recommend Marro for your cat.

reviews.review_text: I tried luna onso many different cat foods to try and get her to eat properly as she was eating more dry food than wet, i would put her food down and she would lick the jelly and leave the meat, so i tried every cat food company and she would eat them to start off with but after a few days she was back to eating just dry food and leaving her wet food, but then i found marro and lunas been on it nearly a year now and she still eats her food she does eat a bit leave it for a bit then eats some more, when i tell u she is the fussiest cat going and she loves marro food plus the box her food comes in also doubles as a cat house and she loves getting in n out of it lol i would urge anyones cat who is fussy to try this, it even makes a difference with her poos they arent really stinky anymore since using this food so its a win win x

reviews.title: I have finally found a food that my fussy cat loves!
reviews.review_text: I have tried Katkin and Untamed, and my cat Misty liked some meats and didn’t like others. With Untamed she only really seems to like the chicken in gravy or chicken in jelly, but then she goes off it after a couple of tins. I must say, she did like the Katkin and would finish the whole packet, which is something she never ever does with store bought food. But she would go off them after a while too. Anyway, I asked ChatGPT what a cheaper alternative would be to KatKin, and it suggested Marro. So I had a look on the website and ordered the trial pack which came the other day. I have just used the last packet this afternoon and Misty seems confused and devastated that there’s no more :grimacing: I’ve put some of her usual stuff down and she will not go near it. She absolutely LOVES the food from Marro and eats it all. She likes it warmed up as well, I think it’s because the jelly melts into a gravy. So this has definitely won me over :blush: Misty’s eating habits have been a huge source of anxiety for me, as she is generally underweight due to how fussy she is. So finding something that she really loves is actually helping us both. It’s going to save me A LOT of money each month as well, as I won’t have to keep buying different selections of wet food when she decides she doesn’t like the taste anymore. The Marro monthly subscription can be tailored to your cat’s needs and is very reasonably priced. So all in all, I would highly recommend these products.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because Marro's food has won over their extremely fussy cat, alleviating anxiety and saving money with a tailored and reasonably priced monthly subscription.

reviews.title: My Sphynx Cleo has food allergies so…
reviews.review_text:
My Sphynx Cleo has food allergies so she has to be on a single protein diet to eliminate the trigger, I have tried absolutely all HA food with no joy, Cleo turned her nose up to absolutely everything, then I saw Marro and how its tailor made with single protein, I wasn’t holding out much hope as we had tried KatKin and as always Cleo didn’t like it. 
Cleo is a Sphynx by name and a true Sphynx by nature. She is extremely fussy and thinks she’s too good for anything lol
But I thought I’d try the trial box as I had nothing to lose as Cleo was rapidly losing weight and her back bone was protruding. Not holding out much hope, Cleo started Marro, I was absolutely amazed. She ate the entire lot within seconds. I thought maybe it was a one off, maybe it was because she was so extremely hungry, but nope, at her next feeding time she ate the entire pouch again. And that Continued happening for the entire week. I was shocked. Finally she was happy. This cat that believes she’s a real goddess is finally eating. And she loves it that much that we’ve increased her portions to 3 times a day because she just can’t get enough of it. Always a clean bowl left. I am extremely grateful for Marro, you saved my baby girl, and allowed her to be the true goddess she is.

I can’t recommend this Company enough.
Due to Cleo’s allergies, I spoke to a lovely lady Georgia in customer service to get the exact right plan, meal size, calorie intake, flavours and delivery plan that is exactly right for Cleo. There is so much flexibility with Marro, they even have vets on hand to help too.
An absolutely amazing company which has changed Cleo’s life. Her skin looks incredible and no more protruding back bone. She’s completely Thriving :relaxed:
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's tailor-made single protein diet transformed their extremely fussy Sphynx cat's life, resolving food allergies and improving her overall health and well-being.

reviews.title: My cat has (sadly) got a gut disease
reviews.review_text:
My cat has (sadly) got a gut disease. I have spent years with vet advice, trying to stabilise this for him with specialist foods. These worked for a few months, then the blood in diarrhoea started again.
He was within hours of death 18 months ago with a sudden exacerbation of his disease which necessitated hospital admission. 
I then discovered Marro. New beginning for my cat! He has the beef version and this has been a complete turnaround in his health. He has gained weight, his fur is thick and he has loads more energy. His poo is now formed and is once a day. His disease cannot be cured but Marro Beef has been an absolute epiphany for him and he is enjoying his best life now.
I am so relieved to have found this amazing food and hope it continues to offer him a comfortable life.
Big plus is that he LOVES it :heart_eyes_cat:

They’ve never been super food motivated but since making the switch, they’re hungry little gremlins. The price is also very reasonable for the quality of food you get. The little menu it comes with is adorable and the box with the cut outs for a cat house is such a lovely addition, they’ve thought of everything and those finishing touches make such a difference. My cats look forward to the box almost as much as the food:rolling_on_the_floor_laughing: it’s clear that this brand is run by people who genuinely care for cats wellbeing and aren’t just in it for quick profit. reviews.title: All my felines love MARRO
reviews.review_text:
All my felines love MARRO, but it is more sparse for them during the summer, (I need some ice cream space) unless someone will donate an extra Marro freezer for Simba & co.
I feed alongside dry food otherwise I would have to starve. 
If you know how to communicate to Fin the robot properly, you'll get through to the human Marro team too.
Once that happens, the team is always super accommodating and helpful. 
To rate a team member one will see their photo too, which is a nice touch.
I have been with Marro now for - I think - two years, after "Katkin" changed their receipe and it was aweful.
I hope Marro keeps it as is!!!
The new flavours go down extremely well too. Only turkey mine don't seem to like any longer.
It is a bit tough for my vegetarian stomach to have to deal with, heating the pouches with hot water ( not in microwave as sooo bad) and serve.
But a servant I'll remain.

Reading lots of the 1/2 star comments it seems some people don't understand what needs to be done to not repeat orders if unsatisfactory. Nor how to serve the very fatty beef in a better way (I can't stand that one either, but learnt to let it warm up in hot water longer for the fat to melt, no problem then and using a knife to make smaller portions) Maybe those aspects could be addressed in marketing as well as highlight more prominently that freezer space is needed.

reviews.title: Finally food my cat loves
reviews.review_text:
Review by Ziggy (the Cat)

Hello, Ziggy here — writing this review because my human clearly isn’t qualified to judge good cat cuisine.

For years I’ve been known as a “fussy eater” with a sensitive stomach. Translation: most food is simply not up to my standards. Bowls were sniffed, rejected, and left untouched.

Then my human served me Marro cat food.

Well… everything changed.

I now lick my bowl completely clean every night (especially when it’s slightly warmed in the microwave — highly recommended). It tastes great, the texture is perfect, and best of all it doesn’t upset my delicate digestive system..

Highly recommended to all discerning cats. I very much hope my human continues to keep the freezer stocked, especially as she informs me the customer service has been top notch when she has contacted them  , it’s so easy to order, swap my meal plans & take delivery . 

My official verdict: five paws out of five

— Ziggy :feet:
reviews.summary: Ziggy, a fussy cat with a sensitive stomach, gave Marro cat food 5 stars because it tastes great, doesn't upset her digestive system, and her human appreciates the top-notch customer service and convenient ordering process.

My cat is very fussy and changes her taste from month to month, so if she is off fish, I can reduce this and increase chicken if I need too.

reviews.title: Huge improvement in gut health.
reviews.review_text:
Having changed my dog to Butternut Box, I wanted a cat alternative and came across Marro. The cats (9 years old) were initially disappointed that it wasn’t their jelly filled junk food, but soon ate it when they realised I wasn’t going back to the other brand. They now love it and we have empty bowls every time. At a recent vet check, our vet was impressed with their condition and overall health and wanted to recommend the brand to other clients as well as trying it out on her own cats.
Signing up is straightforward and the website is easy to navigate. An app would be better, but I understand that’s under development. I can change my delivery date, types of food and frequency of delivery with no issues and I’ve never had an issue with delivery (it’s  usually DPD). 
I think they’ve been on the food for about 9 months, possibly longer and the biggest improvement is their gut health. No more hairballs; no more smelly poos in the litter tray or garden, just neat little ones that seem to degrade in the soil, as I don’t seem to find many. And no, it’s not because they go on other people’s gardens; we have cat fences.
It is more expensive, but in agreement with vet, it’s an investment in their health. If humans are encouraged to reduce their UPF intake, we should do the same for our pets.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's high-quality cat food significantly improved their cats' gut health and overall well-being, making it a worthwhile investment despite being more expensive.

Not only has his appetite improved, but his weight and overall body condition are noticeably better, and his fur is unbelievably soft and silky. It’s clear he’s healthier and happier.
On top of that, Marro’s customer service is genuinely 5-star—friendly, responsive, and helpful.
I highly recommend this food. If you’re anything like me and would do anything to keep your cat happy and healthy, this is absolutely worth trying.

reviews.title: Such a wonderful difference
reviews.review_text:
So we took on two rescue kittens that had been left abandoned.  The first couple of weeks were really tough, their eating was off the chart, standard whiskas/Felix type sachets just seemed to leave them hungry and worse still seemed to be the cause of upset stomachs.
We took on the trial box of marro and within days their behaviour had calmed enormously, the screeching for food stopped and upset stomachs stopped and instead of feeding them 4 or 5 times a day on those sachets, we give them 2 a day and they're so content 
Not to mention the cute little menu that comes with their food selection and even the box it comes in is precut to be used as a play thing for your cat 
I really can't praise them enough
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's food transformed their rescue kittens' health and behavior, stopping upset stomachs and reducing hunger.

reviews.title: Nicky the ragdoll - no more tummy issues!
reviews.review_text:
Our cat, Nicky, had been on Royal Canin gastrointestinal food for a few months because he suffered with a sensitive tummy. It was the one food he could tolerate most of the time.

We actually came across Marro by accident when someone was promoting it at IKEA and offering the first box at a heavily discounted rate. Because it’s hypoallergenic, we thought, “What’s the worst that could happen?”

He absolutely loves it, and his tummy seems to love it too. He’s now toileting like a normal cat, whereas before he needed a combination of gastrointestinal food and daily probiotics. With Marro, he doesn’t even need the probiotics because they’re already included in the food. He has been on Marro now for 5 months and there is no going back. 

If your cat has a sensitive tummy like Nicky, I would really recommend giving Marro a try!
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's hypoallergenic food greatly improved their cat's sensitive tummy issues, eliminating the need for daily probiotics and gastrointestinal food.

reviews.title: Food has changed the game for my cats
reviews.review_text: Food has changed the game for my cats, I have 5 cats that were constantly begging for food, they had incredibly gross smelling litter trays, dull itchy coats and just a bit lethargic most of the time. I’ve only had the 2 week trial box so far, and in 2 weeks the difference in their coats is incredible, they’re so silky and soft, much less shedding and the litter tray has been a less daunting task… no more explosive movements! As for the energy levels, they have turned into absolute little terrorists, they’ve all been running around like hooligans, it sounds like WWE smackdown is happening the way they thunder around chasing eachother and flying around jumping all over thei kitty towers and around the catio. It’s like they’ve drank from the fountain of youth, they’re like kittens again, just furry little chaos nuggets having the best time. I’ve got 4 pedigree house cats and a moggy and they’ve gone from being lazy couch potatoes, to what they assume to be feline Olympic champions.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits

reviews.title: Best decision I've ever made!
reviews.review_text:
I'm not one for subscribing to things, however, Christian from the Marro team was very persistent and what I liked is that he referred to my cat by his first name everytime.
I've been struggling to find a food that my cat does throw up and Christian assured me this was the right food for my cat (his Irsh accent helped a lot :grin:) my first box arrived, love the packaging. I've now been feeding this to my cat for 14 days and he has literally not thrown up once, I can't quote believe it.
Now if it wasn't for Christian and his persistence, I would still be clearing up vomit.
This food is amazing, I love that you can freeze it and warm it up, my cat loves it warmed up. I'm now waiting for my next delivery which arrives Monday and I can't wait. I want to thank Marro for taking the time to figure out what cats actually need in there food and Christian for he's absolute amazing customer service, he's a credit to the Marro company. My senior boy, can now eat and enjoy his food, without the fear of throwing up. I will shout about Marro from the roof tops, as I truly have found a food the is right for my Dexter cat. Thank you Marro.

reviews.title: Ragdoll_cheekynala
reviews.review_text:
We’ve been feeding our little Ragdoll kitten Nala Marro cat food and we honestly couldn’t be happier with it. The quality is excellent and there’s a great range of flavours and varieties to choose from, which keeps mealtimes interesting for her.
Most importantly, Nala absolutely loves it and clears her bowl every time! It’s reassuring to know she’s enjoying food that’s both tasty and high quality.
We’ll definitely be continuing to buy Marro and would highly recommend it to other cat owners.
Don’t be put off by the occasional negative comments about delivery, as that’s separate from Marro itself (DPD handles the shipping). One of our boxes was delayed by a day, but it still arrived really cold and fresh thanks to the excellent insulation and ice packs inside. In fact, 9 out of 10 times our deliveries arrive still frozen. Brilliant service and product! 10/10

My other cat has never really been motivated by food, eat when shes hungry but now, even Trudy is begging for her Marro at dinner time! At least once a week a cat would be sick, but I put it down to other factors nut after moving to Marro there hasnt been anymore sick!! reviews.title: Written on behalf of my humans....
reviews.review_text:
I am writing this on behalf of my humans as apparently they are too busy and I have been snoozing half of the day, but I don’t mind as it is impawtent that others hear my story....

My humans came home from a shopping trip one day and told me they had met a man in town who was pawmoting Marro and that a box of food just for me would be arriving soon. I had heard my humans say loads of times that they were thinking of getting me some different food but they never got around to it so I was glad they met this man.  I was so excited and impatient for my box to arrive as I had grown tired of the same old food that I picked at and left most of the "meat" after licking the  jelly off. 

Good news is it arrived the very next day and it came in a cardboard box that I got to play in!  It was a sample box and over the past few weeks I have tried all the flavours.

My absolute favourite is the pork but I don't like the beef at all so my humans logged on to the account and very easily altered my next box so I get more pork and no beef.

They say they can paws a delivery too if need be (I hope they don't) I leave not a bite of food and look forward to my next meal. I have heard my humans saying how pleased they are I like it and that it is worth the money as I am eating every last bite. I am an indoor cat and have a litter tray, they no longer call me stinky and they have even told me how shiny my fur is.

Oooh I hear the fridge door, gotta go, just one last thing to say...

Don't delay get your cat some Marro today!
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The cat's owner gave 5 stars because their previously fussy cat loves Marro food, eats every last bite, and has shown health improvements such as shiny fur and reduced litter tray odor.

reviews.review_text: Coco and Zeus seem to really enjoy Marro.  At the moment they are sharing a pouch each day but they will enjoy having one each from Friday.  Up to now they have liked every flavour and don’t leave any morsels in the bowl.   I like the fact that their meals can be changed if necessary.

reviews.title: As soon as I put marro food down for my…
reviews.review_text: As soon as I put marro food down for my cat she's there eating it. I have tried lots of other brands and she eats them for a few days then goes off them. Also they fill her up where as other foods Im giving her 2 pouches each meal. This can be up to 6 pounds aday.

reviews.title: Changed my cat's life
reviews.review_text:
We adopted a 13 year old cat that was allergic to standard cat food. When we eventually found Marro, it was life changing. I swear it added more years to her life... she ended up living until she was 18.

Her fur used to fall out and she looked scruffy, and her poos used to be frequent and liquid. That was before Marro...

Norma took to the new food quickly, and the improvements were almost immediate. She had healthy fur, and healthy poos.

It was worth every penny.

Unfortunately Norma did pass away this month, and I was blown away by the kindness of Marro, when they sent me a plant and a card after sharing the news of her passing.

Marro, i will be a customer for life. Thank you <3
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's cat food significantly improved their 13-year-old cat's health and coat, and the company showed exceptional kindness and customer service after the cat's passing.

reviews.title: Misty absolutely LOVES Marro!
reviews.review_text:
The Marro website is so easy to use and so simple to adjust your delivery needs each month to exactly what your cat needs.
Since the first packet, Misty, who is an extremely fussy eater and has suffered a lot with IBD type symptoms, has got excited and extremely friendly as soon as I get a packet out of the fridge and is very impatient during the 15 seconds it is warming up in the microwave!
She has eaten every bit of food up, except for one flavour (which she has always struggled with anyway).
She seems more content and settled in herself and her poos are less smelly and much better formed.
I am so relieved and happy that I have found a food that Misty not only really enjoys and eats consistently, but is healthy and good for her in so many ways.
I am so glad I decided to try Marro - we will most certainly be sticking around!
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's food has not only pleased their extremely fussy cat, but also improved the cat's health and digestion, bringing relief and happiness to the owner.

reviews.title: INCREDIBLE customer service & great product
reviews.review_text:
I just wanted to take a moment to share how truly exceptional my experience was with Marro thanks to Enis and his incredible customer service. From start to finish, he went above and beyond in every possible way. It’s rare these days to come across someone who is not only professional and knowledgeable, but also genuinely kind and committed to making sure everything is handled perfectly — and that’s exactly what Enis delivered. From the beginning, Enis was attentive and patient. He took the time to really listen and understand my concerns without rushing me or making me feel like just another customer. Every question I had was answered thoroughly and clearly, and he made sure I felt completely confident and comfortable with everything before moving forward. His communication was prompt, clear, and thoughtful throughout the entire process.What truly stood out was his positive attitude and willingness to go the extra mile.Enis handled everything calmly and efficiently. He was proactive in finding solutions and kept me updated every step of the way. It was obvious that he genuinely cared about delivering the best possible outcome for myself & meowmeow.(my cat)
Enis represents customer service at its absolute best. His professionalism, dedication, and friendly demeanor made the entire experience smooth and enjoyable. Because of him, I wouldn’t hesitate to return or recommend Marrow If every business had someone like Enis on their team, customer satisfaction would never be a concern.Thank you, Enis, for setting such a high standard and for making this such a positive experience
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars due to the exceptional customer service provided by Enis, who went above and beyond to ensure a smooth and enjoyable experience.

reviews.title: You won't regret trying Marro
reviews.review_text:
I have a maine coon cat with IBD. After 8 months of diet trials and meds, i tried Marro Turkey flavour wet food. Overnight she became a completely different cat!!!  Shes now been on it 6 months and has only been sick once and that was a hairball!! 

I spent days in tears before my research brought me to Marro and i haven't looked back!  Her poos are completely normal too. She is off all her meds and is just a happy cat!  

Shes put on loads of weight too. Shes now the same size as her sister and she looks so good!  


The food is cooked, arrives frozen and you just defrost it in the fridge. You can serve it warm or cold. I serve cold.

reviews.review_text:
I just want to say that the last 24hrs has seen some of the best customer service I have ever experienced.
This is the second time since starting Leo on the Marro journey a couple of years ago that things have not gone to plan. As frustrating as that is I’m very aware that it can happen. These days perfect quality is a minimum expectation but from time to time things go wrong and it’s not the problem that we get measured on, it’s our response to the problem.

Since receiving the order yesterday and sending my email late last night I received an instant message to tell me it was received and would be dealt with, I then had an initial human message this afternoon to promise to make amends. I didn’t pick this up until tonight and initially my thoughts turned to having to take further photos and provide evidence of batches, etc…. Not the biggest problem but then I saw your follow up message saying you’d evaluated the photos I uploaded and no further action needed.

Your speed and quality of response is for me the absolute benchmark for anyone in the customer services sector and I commend you and the Marro company for your care, attention and even creativity and passion in that area!!

In 24 hrs you’ve taken me from being frustrated at the delivery to feeling special and valued as a customer and probably even more so than if everything had gone smoothly.

I applaud you for your attitude, professionalism but most of all empathetic and ‘human’ way you’ve responded once again.

Oh and as for the product itself, Leo used to have significant tummy troubles, probably from years of feeding him the main brand foods, which we now realise are like gorging on McDonalds every day!!  He loved the Marro food since day 1 and since converting him he’s healthier, happier, put a little weight on as intended, his coat has never been so thick and soft, and his tummy’s back to normal !!  Great product, lovely team and purrfect customer service. Thank you!!!
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars due to the exceptional customer service they received from Marro, which turned their frustration into a positive experience, and also because their cat's health significantly improved after switching to Marro food.

reviews.title: :star2: Five stars without hesitation:star2:
reviews.review_text:
:star2::star2::star2::star2::star2:Marro has completely transformed mealtimes for my two one year old Ragdoll cats Frank and Maggie who are brother and sister and famously fussy. From the very first serving they were hooked bowls licked clean and genuine excitement at feeding time which I have never had before.

The quality is outstanding you can see and smell the difference immediately and it is reassuring to know they are eating proper nutritious food made with care. Their coats are softer digestion has improved and they are happier more content cats overall.

Ordering is refreshingly easy and the website is laid out beautifully making it very clear exactly what food you are choosing and what is included. Everything is simple transparent and stress free which makes the whole experience even better.

What really stands out is that Marro clearly understands cats their preferences and their health needs. This is food made by people who genuinely care and it shows in the results.

I would confidently recommend Marro to any cat owner especially those struggling to find something their cats truly enjoy. Frank and Maggie are living proof that this is five star food made for five star cats.:heart_eyes_cat::heart_eyes_cat::heart_eyes_cat:
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits

It’s worth every penny.

reviews.title: My cats adore Marro - warm the pouches and mush the gravy into the meat
reviews.review_text: We have 2 rescue kittens who are now 11 months old. We stumbled across Marro at the Ideal Christmas show and thought we’d give it a go. From day one both loved it. I’m now in a routine of taking 7 sachet packs out of the freezer  into the fridge each week to defrost, I flip the kettle on and  warm the pouches in hot water to let the gravy melt into the meat. As soon as the monsters hear the kettle going on they run into the kitchen. Zippy try’s to steal the packets as he’s so impatient!! I mush the gravy into the meat and both dive in. I give them one sachet each a day and supplement with lighter food in the morning and biscuits are left down throughout the day. They adore this food, the vet complimented them in shiny coats and overall health - recommend highly

reviews.title: Marro has been such a brilliant…

Marro has been such a brilliant addition to our lives. Nico (:cat2:) is obsessed with the food, and I (:woman-gesturing-ok::skin-tone-4:) am equally obsessed with the convenience.

One thing I really wanted to mention is the visible improvement in Nico’s health. He’s had small bald patches on his temples since he was a kitten, which I always assumed were normal. I’ve consistently fed him high-quality wet food (worth every penny), but since switching to Marro those patches are now fully covered.

Bonus point: his poos are no longer… questionable. No smell, no drama.

I genuinely can’t rave enough about this product — happy cat, happy human, and a very relieved litter tray situation.

reviews.title: We love Marro in our house, definitely warm it first
reviews.review_text:
We love Marro in our house. After a gentle introduction to their food (they provide a guide to making the change), both my cats absolutely love it. Dave (9 month Ragdoll) isn’t keen on fish or pork and is obsessed with the beef. Fidel (12 year old Void) licks his bowl clean with every single flavour. We’ve abandoned kibble completely now, and they each have two of the larger 90g portions a day. From chilled, I microwave a single pouch for 20-25 seconds to warm the food and melt the fats into a delicious gravy and this is far nicer for my boys than plopping a congealed, cold lump into a bowl. It smells really good too! We’ve got shiny coats, bright eyes and much less smelly poo. 

I buy six weeks worth at a time to get the best price. Customer service has been excellent, with very quick response times and the odd packing error rectified super fast. 

10/10 would absolutely recommend you try your cats on Marro.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits

reviews.title: Good Stuff!
reviews.review_text:
We decided to try our two boys on Marro after they had been having another fresh meat brand and gone off it, and we saw the stand in Pets at Home.
From the moment we opened a packet of Marro, they showed interest and sniffed it warily before gobbling it down! 
The variety of meats and fish in the packs is good and the quality of the contents is wonderfully tender. It isn't hard to mash up for them both and they both empty their bowl, asking for more!
It arrives well packed, with ice packs on top (in warmer months I would expect more to keep it frozen)to keep it frozen and stores easily in our freezer.
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their previously fussy cats immediately took to Marro's high-quality food with varied and tender meats, and now eagerly finish their meals.

reviews.title: When I got my kitten
reviews.review_text: When I got my kitten, the lady I got her from told me she’d been feeding her Marro food so I decide to continue with it and our beautiful kitten is thriving!  The website is easy to use, great choice of flavours and the communication delivery & packaging etc is great! Really pleased so far!
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their kitten is thriving on Marro food and they're pleased with the website, flavor options, and delivery.

reviews.title: Marro is amazing
reviews.review_text: Marro is amazing! I have the most fussy boy, we’ve spent months and so much money trying all these fancy cat foods, it’s a mind field! He used to leave his wet food and there are too many out there but I came across Marro and thought here we go again but I was pleasantly surprised, so was my cat! He now runs to his bowl when I get it out, he’s so excited to eat, the gravy gives him hydration and the small touches in the packaging really shows they care! We’re getting a second cat and will instantly be ordering for him! The only improvement I’d say is in the questionnaire it should ask if you want the cat to have a mix of dry and wet or just wet and adjust portion sizes accordingly. I know marro don’t do dry food but my cat likes to eat both so I had to go on live chat to figure out his portions. Apart from that 10/10 perfection!
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's food pleased their extremely fussy cat, who now eagerly eats and benefits from the hydration provided by the gravy.

reviews.title: Prescription food to fresh food!
reviews.review_text: My girl has suffered with urine crystal's pretty much her whole life! I wasted alot of money on multiple different kinds of prescription cat food trying to better her but nothing helped! I also wasn’t a fan of the ingredients in those foods so I joined a Facebook group for holistic healing in cats i discovered more natural remedies along with a higher protein diet and was recommended to raw feed but my girl is a major fuss pot so next best option was to try fresh food and that’s when I found marrow! Although it’s more expensive than supermarket food or even prescription food the difference in my girl on this food is amazing! She has a lot more energy and is more playful! She also now eats more kinds of meat, before on wet food pouches she would refuse anything other than fish! Might cost me abit more but the difference in my girl is 100% worth it!
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's fresh food significantly improved their cat's health and energy, making the extra cost worthwhile.

reviews.title: Loved your introductory pack and it…
reviews.review_text: Loved your introductory pack and it came with a little spork! Loads of advice. Jazmin loved the box and recent orders the box got shared with other cat owners! Jazmin prefers your brand to KatKin! Btw thank you for the lovely Xmas present for jazmin xxx
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because their cat, Jazmin, prefers Marro's brand over others, such as KatKin, and the customer appreciated the company's thoughtful gestures and advice.

reviews.title: Snezhana (Snez) loves Marro
reviews.review_text:
Snezhana (Snez) loves Marro! I was shocked as we’ve tried several other brands and she just turns her nose up and refuses to eat them. The difference with Marro is that it doesn’t smell terrible either. She wasn’t keen on the Beef but cleans her bowl completely with the chicken and the turkey packs. We’re going to try a fish one this month, fingers crossed! She goes in for a big op tomorrow so we’ll send a pack in with her as she’ll be in overnight, at least she’ll have food she enjoys then to tempt her. 
I’ve also found her skin has improved dramatically. She has always suffered from dandruff but it has completely cleared up! 
Thank you Marro
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits

reviews.review_text: My cat loves Marro. He’s still extremely fussy, and won’t always eat all his food, but the portion sizes are perfect and there’s enough variety to keep him interested. Before he wouldn’t eat anything at all, and only begged for human scraps, so I experimented with so many “fresh cat food” brands and marro is the first one that he actually ate the whole pack of food. He’s a spoilt diva now who has been having marro from age 3 months to present day and counting :joy:

reviews.title: I got introduced to Marro via Harry at…
reviews.review_text:
I got introduced to Marro via Harry at Blenheim Palace. I was very intrigued as I am always keen to hear about 'real food' for my cat. I was very impressed by the ingredients, as some other brands tend to pack out their protein with Tapioca. This isn't the case for Marro. I received the introductory offer the next day and Wilfred (my cat) licked his bowl clean and does so every single day! The quality of the food is unmatched to any other 'premium' brand of 'real cat food' and I'm most thrilled I've discovered them, here in Chester! Thanks Marro! 
Ps: Your packaging is always another treat to receive as it's incredibly well thought out! 
Meow, meow!!
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because they were impressed by Marro's high-quality ingredients and their cat, Wilfred, loves the food, licking his bowl clean every day.

reviews.review_text: My cat has suspected IBD and has been having diarrhea. I have tried him on various cat foods and he will not eat it. He actually enjoys Marro and his stools are solid now . The only issue is that he always wants more !

reviews.title: Our experience with Marro 12/2025
reviews.review_text:
My cat, Thorin, is normally a talkative cat. Since receiving and regularly enjoying Marro, he haunts me. He unleashes a single note, without beginning or end, that reverberates through our home when any movement is made toward the kitchen. He exists now only to enjoy your offerings.

+ Easy to open and serve
+ Cat is borderline addicted to it
+ Price is reasonable
+ Meals have helped his coat and energy, along with losing a bit of weight (part of the plan)

- I feel like I need a bigger freezer to hold an entire order
- He will literally scream at us if we get up because he thinks food is coming
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because Marro's cat food has significantly improved their cat's health, energy, and coat, and their cat is now obsessed with the food.

reviews.review_text:

My older cat, 12yrs, seems to be full of energy too, she has zoomies every evening which is great to see.

My youngest cat, age 5yrs, is a very big boy and on a bit of a diet but the portion sizes seem to be perfect for him.

Outstanding!

I have been struggling to find food for my cat Freddie as he has a sensitive tummy and is fussy as well. Bless him! So I decided to try him with the trial box offer.

From Day one he has eaten every last morsel (apart from the beef, which he is not overly keen on!).  For my follow up box it was simple to amend the contents and replace the beef with any of the other varieties.

I am very pleased to not be throwing away food that Freddie has ignored and to see him tucking into his meals. Thank you Marro!:+1::skin-tone-3:

reviews.title: One of my cats Bond is very picky with…
reviews.review_text:
One of my cats Bond is very picky with what he likes to eat, so I initially got Marro for my other cat Loid to try… however to my surprise, when feeding it for the first time to Loid, Bond came over and absolutely loved it! 

I now feed it to both of them and my new kitten Anya, who also loves it. The different choices of meats is great for me, as I like to feed my cats a variety - also pork is a meat I find not many companies do and it seems to be their favourite!

The food is packaged very well and the box it comes in is lovely :relaxed: I always allow my cats to use it after for playtime!

Would definitely recommend. I have tried many different foods and as I said, only this and a few other brands food seems to be all my fussy British Shorthair Bond likes!

reviews.title: Worth the money!
reviews.review_text:
It is only the pricer side of cat food,but once you a actually look into what is inside the super market cat food it is well worth it, for the sake of your cats health - they deserve better!Long term this probably will save you money anyway on vet bills, not that that should be the primary reason. 

It's always beautifully packaged, and such a nice experience to open, very well thought through - was so chuffed with the catnip Christmas bauble freebee in my latest package, great attention to detail. It's so easy to edit your subscription if you want to try out new food, change the order day, amount of food ect. Always arrives on time, in chilled packaging. I'll never go back to supermarket cat food unless in a pinch.

Use this along a good quality dry food, bone broth, occasional sardines and treats. It took no time for my cat to adjust to the food, he loves it !

I am a vegan for ethical and environmental reasons, and it gives me peace of mind knowing I have picked a more ethical and sustainable alternative. B corp certified is a plus!
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits

What can I say - he absolutely loves Marro! Can’t get enough of it and is eating every flavour I put in front of him. 

Quality is very good, delivery has been great so far. It’s well packaged to keep the food frozen and fresh. So far I would highly recommend.

She is now on her 2nd box and loving all the flavours at 18 yrs old all we want is her to enjoy her food. She now eats all up, is playing with her toys, her coat is lovely thick and shiny,  her stools are solid and I am happy she is eating everything again. It may be more expensive but we'll worth it.

reviews.title: What a fantastic company
reviews.review_text:
What a fantastic company! I had a few issues with the courier not delivering my trial box, then missing the next day too, which meant that food would no longer be safe to feed my fur baby, Marro instantly dispatched a fresh box of food which they did a rush delivery on and refunded half the cost of the box and a £10 credit on my account, which I think was going above and beyond, considering it was the courier not Marro that messed up! 
When my box arrived, Molly (my fur baby) couldn't get enough of her new food! She's been eating less and less lately, not wanting to eat any of the supermarkets high end stock :cry: Molly was becoming sickly, constantly getting a running nose and upset tummy. Molly is fourteen years old and was thoroughly miserable at meal time, all I could get her to eat was fresh roast chicken. But, thanks to Marro, things are changing fast! 
The food looks and smells amazing and the fact that Molly is licking her plate clean says it all.
Marro's customer service is faultless, they have done everything in their power to rectify the couriers ineptitude. 
They have won mine and Mollys heart :heart: 
Well done Marro, many thanks for all your help and support.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars due to Marro's exceptional customer service and the significant improvement in their cat's health and eating habits after switching to Marro's food.

reviews.title: Cats love it
reviews.review_text:
We went through all the supermarket brands before we started experimenting with all these high quality subscription services like Katkins, Untamed etc. 

Our cats are SUPER fussy and generally want something new to eat every day. Our cats are NOT 'neophobic' despite one of the premium companies insisting that all cats dislike new foods. In fact, I've never had a cat who was even slightly like this. 

This Marro is the ONLY food the cats have been happy to eat day after day, month after month. The food smells amazing, like food you could eat yourself. 

But the thing that prompted this review is the incredible customer service I received recently. There was a mix up with my order (my fault) and I needed help. I emailed the company and got a quick reply. The response was outstanding, with personal, careful and considered attention given to my issue. 

Very, very happy to recommend Marro for your cats and for you.

reviews.title: Cured my cats ibs/colitis
reviews.review_text: My cat has had something like ibs or colitis for four years, vet couldn’t do anything and I tried every food available, including raw.  Since starting Marro almost a year ago his symptoms have completely gone. I’ve tried other home cooked brands but they’ve made him sick. Marro works and for that reason I highly recommend it. Note that he only eats the turkey and pork types, he didn’t like the fish, is allergic to chicken and I don’t like to give him beef. I also have to say that the little things Marro do, like sending a toy every now and then, I also love. I really hope they keep recipes as they are and don’t change as they expand their business, as there’s really nothing else I can feed my cat.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's food resolved their cat's long-standing digestive issues, with no recurrence of symptoms after almost a year of use.

reviews.title: Marro has been absolutely exceptional…
reviews.review_text: Marro has been absolutely exceptional to our little kitten, from the freedom to edit your package however you want to the moment it gets to you- everything is handled with care and consideration. She is completely regulated herself, she seems so much more comfortable and excitable but also snoozy when we are. She has an awareness that she didn’t have before, the customer service that we have received about issues with delivery or queries about our order have been phenomenal. The customer service helpline as well as their team online have been nothing short of perfect. We are definitely lifelong customers now- and recommending to everyone we know!!

reviews.title: My fussy boy loves it! Very happy kitty.
reviews.review_text:
I have a very fussy boy, who has got fed up with a lot of other subscription cat foods, so I have been feeding him on fresh chicken. This has made him put on a lot of weight, since he is a greedy tabby. I never go on facebook, but was sent a link to something else - then started doom scrolling! - and came across Marro. It had a bigger meat content than other subscription cat food, so I thought I'd give it a go. I was very surprised that he took to Marro only after a day or so.
I like that his food is portioned according to his profile, and he is now losing weight and is looking good, his coat is very glossy now. He absolutely loves the gravy, the only criticism I can say is that there is not enough!, so I usually add a little water to it. He loves all the meat, but not too keen on the fish. All in all, I'm very glad that I came across Marro.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's high meat content cat food helped their fussy and overweight cat lose weight and achieve a healthy, glossy coat.

It was easy to adjust the boxes a she doesn't like the fish flavour much and change it to ones she does like. After the discount runs out, we pay just over £33 a month for a monthly box which honestly, works out great value for us (she gets one pouch a day.)

Plus, the little freebies you get and the Marro cardboard box have been lovely to get. Absolutely recommend this!

Since starting him on Marro, we have seen a complete reversal in every aspect with him! 
He’s starting to put on weight, he is chasing our younger cat around the house again, playing with his toys and he’s not vomited once! 
He eats all his food and it satisfies his appetite, he’s no longer walking around begging for more food after a millisecond after eating. 

Marro has made Gizmo into his old younger self! It is great value for money compared to the other brands both in store and online.

reviews.title: Fantastic results from using Marro.
reviews.review_text:
We have a pure white 17+ year old cat, we adopted Ten as a rescue kitten and have loved him beyond measure ever since. He had always been full of life and was a very large fun loving cat, in his prime weighing in at 5.6kg, not fat, just very big and muscular.  5 years ago, although his vaccinations were all up to date he developed cat flu, which then caused asthma & rhinitis, he then developed serious arthritis which meant monthly injections, sadly the side effects from the injections caused benign (thank goodness) tumors, after their removal he was diagnosed with an overactive thyroid. From all the various medications and steroids he started struggling with muscle and weight loss dropping to 3kg, his breathing issues got much worse and he became frail, but still happy.  6 months ago were were told to prepare ourselves for the worst as he was entering his 'twilight months"......heart broken doesn't come close!!
Because he was constantly eating, vomiting eating again we decided to start Ten on a new healthy eating regime, we decided to try Marro, starting slowly and building up.  The change in Ten has been astronomic, he has started to gain his weight back, his fur is thicker & healthier, he is happier, more active and contented, his breathing is easier and the vomiting has eased off. He will eat his portion then be contented.
To top it all at his annual vaccine check up last week our vet said  ".....what ever you are doing  with Ten, keep it up, I couldn't be happier with him!'.  Thank you Marro, we feel that we have our healthy, happy, contented Ten back
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits

reviews.title: Nyafi is a very picky eater
reviews.review_text:
Nyafi is a very picky eater. Well, she used to be. We needed to switch to new brands every few weeks as she refused to eat the same food for more than a handful of times. She also hates "old" food - if it's been in her bowl for a few hrs, she won't eat the rest of it.
But now! We started our 3rd box of Marro and she still loves is! She's so excited when I open the new bag. Also, she doesn't mind to eat it later on, even if it's been in her bowl for a few hrs. We're coming home to bowls licked clean.
I find it really great to be able to alter her selection - she didn't like the fish and the pork too much so we reduced the amount of those, keep trying though. But she absolutely loves the chicken one.
The only difficulty is that we don't have a microwave oven, so I have to warm her food up using hot water bath (it just takes a bit longer).
And one thing I'm a bit sad about... She refuses to sit in the delivery box for some reason. :D
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's food has successfully satisfied their extremely picky cat's eating habits, with the cat eagerly consuming the food even after it's been in the bowl for a few hours.

I like to give mama the run around when it comes to meal times. I like lots of different food until mama buys it in bulk then I go right of it! 

This time mama got it right. Marro tastes so good; I still eat it even after a bulk order! I liked marro since day one and I always lick the plate clean. After dinner I thank mama and sit on her lap and purrr with satisfaction.

P.s I am now testing the new marro chicken flavour and eat a few mouthfuls of sample 1 and then sample 2 and alternate between the two. I like how confused mama looks.

reviews.title: Absolutely love this food!
reviews.review_text:
I spotted the ad for Marro on Facebook, and thought I’d give it a try for my Ragdoll rescue kitten Dave - I wanted him to have high protein food to make up for his poor start in life, hoping he’ll grow and develop to his full potential. 

Had a phone call from the company to get us set up, and our first trial box arrived, which initially Dave wasn’t fussed on, but I stuck with it, using the transitioning suggestions provided. My other cat Fidel (12, black moggy) was more than happy with the leftovers, though. 

I chanced buying a bigger box with all the flavours, and Dave absolutely loves the beef, turkey and chicken - but isn’t too keen on the fish and pork, but Fidel gobbled those up. I noticed his coat becoming super shiny, and he has loads more energy, so decided to make the switch for him too. 

Just had our third box arrive, which was missing the chicken we’d ordered - but that was quickly sorted but the super helpful customer service team - they even sent extra sporks to replace our broken one. 

Husband is tempted to make a toastie with some, he reckons it smells fantastic (I’m a veggie so not quite so keen on the idea) :joy_cat:

There’s no room in the freezer for human food now, but my boys are worth it :joy_cat::heart_eyes_cat:
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their Ragdoll rescue kitten and older cat thrived on Marro's high-protein food, showing significant health improvements, and the company provided excellent customer service.

Now I have two happy cats, that I have to try and separate at meal times because they have never had the same meals before ….but that’s my problem! reviews.title: My moggy loves Marrow
reviews.review_text:
I first heard of Marrow after signing up with Butternut box, I was unsure if my very fussy cat would even touch it as I could never get her to eat any type/brand of wet cat food before (she’s 10 years old :joy:) so she has only had dry cat food but I took the chance and gave it a go and…

She absolutely loved it! 
She is a much healthier weight since starting on Marrow, there are 2 different sized pouches and several tasty meals to choose from (fish, Beef, Chicken, Pork and Turkey). 
It is now a part of her diet on a daily basis alongside her dry food. And as a bonus they do tasty treats that my kitty loves! 

The only thing I would like to see become available is a meal for the older cat, the same food but without all the chunks (more flakey like the fish recipe). 

I would 100% recommend Marrow to anyone looking to change their cats diet.. 

Human quality meat at a reasonable price!
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their previously fussy cat not only loved Marro's food but also experienced a significant health improvement, achieving a healthier weight after switching to the brand.

reviews.title: Excellent service all round
reviews.review_text: Excellent service all round. Sita loves the food (and the box it came in). Our first box even came with a lovely fork, which as soon as Sita sees me grab it she knows it’s food time. Customer service is great - they reply quickly and their emails seem composed by humans instead of a.i. The online portal is easy to use and you can pause your subscription/ change days of deliveries to suit.

reviews.title: My cat loves it!
reviews.review_text:
My nearly 17yo cat is diabetic and is extremely fussy with food, so finding something low carbs that he likes and eats, so he can get his insulin injections, it’s a daily challenge. 
I am so happy I came across Marro commercials and ordered straight away. I received chicken and pork in my trial box. Pork needed two attempts, but chicken was a love from first bite. Now I received a full order, turkey and beef seem to be just as tasty as the chicken, it’s a real joy to see the bowl licked clean (which doesn’t happen often). Since my senior doesn’t have many teeth left, we need to mash up the bigger pieces a bit, but the sight of my cat meowing and asking me to hurry up (he previously only did it with fresh chicken liver!) makes me do it faster :) so far we and our cat a very pleased, hopefully it will stay this way!
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's food has made a significant positive impact on their diabetic and extremely fussy 17-year-old cat's life, with the cat loving the food and showing improved health and appetite.

reviews.title: My cats coats are so soft !!!
reviews.review_text:
My cats coats have never been more luxurious!!! They both feel so silky soft it's amazing. My older cats gut issues cleared up and my younger cat managed to gain some weight :D
I've been feeding my two cats marro since May and I have had no complaints 5 months in. I do give them dry food for breakfast but the eldest was on a wet-only diet for a couple of weeks as he had a gum infection when I rescued him and it definitely revived his appetite. The subscription process and customization is amazing, the Marro team makes sure to give you their best recommendations when it comes to your cats meal plan and how cost effective it can be. I have only good things to say about them. The packaging makes it so the food arrives fresh and ready to put away and I got a few freebies on my first order (a tote and a double sided spork!!). 
The larger price tag is definitely worth it if you want to live worry free about your babies health diet-wise. If you are looking to spoil your cats with the fresh food they deserve I cannot recommend Marro more!
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's high-quality food improved their cats' health, resolving gut issues and promoting a luxurious coat, making the larger price tag worth it.

Gave him the other half which disappeared in a flash. he is now eating one to two pouches a day. Putting on weight and looking so much better. Bobby is 17 years old. Thank you Marro for saving my cat.

reviews.title: Gary gives 5 stars and a big paws up!:blue_heart:
reviews.review_text:
My cat, Gary, has been enjoying Marro since the day it became available. He's a rather fussy eater and likes to pick/graze. Before Marro he'd usually manage half his portion before it has to be binned. He never seemed satisfied, never asked for food or got excited by the prospect of it. He was on the skinny side and I had spent a small fortune on every food possible. 
Marro is the first food ever that gets eaten before it spoils and has to be thrown out! He actually asks for food now, his tail- in the air-vibrates with joy and he honestly looks the best he has in years. I cant fault the service or the food. Neither can Gary!
Its always delivered on time, packaged well and the customer service is EXCEPTIONAL.  
Most importantly I have a happy, healthy Gary who enjoys his food which makes this cat lady very happy indeed! 

Ps- Please never change anything :pray: Gazzah, despite his adorable and innocent appearance can,when provoked, be quite a formidable adversary :scream:

reviews.title: Whiskey loves his Marro!
reviews.review_text:
Whiskey loves his Marro!
He's had a healthy appetite furever, he came to me eating a particular type of supermarket food and loved it..... then one day out of the blue he just went off food, all food.  Very out of character and after a vet check there was nothing physically wrong with him, but a huge worry, so all kinds of new flavours and brands were tried but he didn't stick with them for very long before he went off them. He was rapidly losing weight so we needed to find the right food although we'd exhausted nearly every brand going. Then a friend mentioned Marro to me, told me about their experience and how that is all their cats would eat....so I signed up for a trial box, keeping my fingers crossed he'd like it and bought a wee freezer to keep the delivery in.

What can I say other than Whiskey absolutely loves his succulent chicken and turkey! As soon as he hears me open the fridge and fire up the stove, he pounces into the kitchen, wiggling his tail in excitement and chirping for his din-dins. 

Marro smells and looks good.    He's been eating it since July and he's already gained a much needed kilo back that he lost. HIs fur, oh my, his fur is so lovely now, soft, silky and no more matts.  The litterbox is much easier to deal with too, which is 
a huge bonus for all of us.

Marro customer service is great, really personal and helpful.  I was unsure about subscriptions but it is very easy to move dates forward or back, change flavours and  update delivery sizes.  

Whiskey is so happy and I am over the moon to have him looking so healthy and much more himself again.  Big thanks Marro for everything!
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's high-quality food transformed their cat's health, resolving weight loss and improving coat condition, with excellent customer service to boot.

reviews.review_text: Initially our cat wouldn't eat these so we put them in the freezer and forgot about them. Recently I found them and tried them again. She absolutely loves them. reviews.title: Enis Deserves a Raise! :star:
reviews.review_text:
Had such a lovely chat with Enis from Marro Cat Food! He honestly went above and beyond to help me get a brilliant deal on cat food for my kitten, Banshee, and made the whole experience such a pleasure. You can tell he genuinely cares about both the products and the people he’s helping — we ended up chatting and having a good laugh too!

It’s so refreshing to come across someone who’s not only knowledgeable and helpful, but also kind, funny, and just genuinely lovely to talk to. You don’t often get service like that these days, and it really stood out to me.

I can’t wait to try the product and see how much healthier Banshee’s diet will be — I’ve got such a good feeling about it already! Thank you, Enis — you made my day, and I’ll definitely be recommending Marro Cat Food to friends and family. :cat::sparkles:

P.S. Thanks for reminding me I need to book my MOT before the call ended — I would’ve 100% forgotten! Haha :sweat_smile:

reviews.title: Very helpful help-desk & web-site supported a partial migration to fresh food
reviews.review_text: Our 4 year old ragdoll female cat, Lulu, was brought up on expensive 'sensitive tummy' kibble and we thought going 50/50 with Marro not only good for her for a more rounded diet but also more cost-effective for us. She has never been previously been good with staying with 'wet' food but following the helpful advice and guidance from the Marro web-site and help desk team she now eats 3/4 of a pouch in 3 or 4 sittings a day - unless it's pork which she loves and will eat the lot. This is a little short of the whole pouch a day she should have (with the remaining 50% grazing her kibble) but we're working on it slowly which is the only way to go. We are now on our first 6-weekly box which should last 3 months on a 50-50 mix with kibble which spreads the cost further. The web-site is easy to use. You can adjust the frequency of the boxes and can skip a box if need be or defer the delivery date to suit you. You can also adjust the mix of the 5 flavours to suit your cat (i.e. Lulu loves pork and beef more than the others). On the day the box is delivered, you are told a delivery window of 1 hour, unpack the box ASAP and put the pouches into the freezer with a few in the fridge to defrost. Lulu also likes the boxes it comes in, which is perforated as a house (except I have to make the entrance larger to accomodate her) and the sheep wool insulation makes nice cushions for her. The other gifts have included her own spork and a sturdy mouse she wasn't keen on until I attached some string to it's tail to tempt her to catch it. The help desk people are clearly cat lovers and have been very helpful when Lulu went through a phase of not eating the food partly caused by guinea pigs temporarily sharing her space and dog treats that were advised to us as being suitable for cats but were too rich for her sensitive tummy.  Having just received our first 6-week box, I hope we can fine tune the quantities of the flavours to best suit her. So far, looking good.
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because they were extremely satisfied with Marro's high-quality food, excellent customer service, and convenient subscription benefits, which have helped their fussy cat thrive on a 50/50 mix with kibble.

reviews.title: Excellent Fresh Food
reviews.review_text:
I’ve been using Marro for my two cats for about a year now and I absolutely love it. Prior to Marro, fresh food packaging problems were a sore spot for me however, I have had zero issues since I’ve made the transition. The cats love the food, they eat it consistently. The smell from their litter trays has significantly decreased and their fur is soft and silky. I haven’t had any recurring problems with diarrhea and/or vomiting.  

Their customer service team is so lovely and responsive. Their prices are also very affordable when you compare it to others and the value you are getting. 

If you’re hesitating about trying them out, from one fussy cat parent to another … DO IT.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's high-quality food improved their cats' health, reduced litter tray smell, and provided excellent customer service.

reviews.title: An old man that loves his food
reviews.review_text: Guinness is a old man who is about 17 years old. He loves food, especially my dinner and sometimes he'll even drink my tea. He seemed to be more hungry recently,vet says he's in good health so not a health issue making him hungry. He would eat 3/4 pouches of regular cat food, sometimes only taking a few mouthfuls. Marro is different. 2 pouches a day. Breakfast and dinner and I've had no dinner stolen or him shouting for treats between meals. Guinness would definitely recommend this and as for the human servant. Delivery and price are great.
reviews.summary: The reviewer's 17-year-old cat, Guinness, loves Marro cat food and now eats only 2 pouches a day, with no more begging for human food or treats, thanks to the high-quality ingredients and product.

Unfortunately could only get a few licks out of him - which to be honest is better than a lot of brands fare. I'm still giving this a 5* review however mostly because the customer service has been A*. Had an issue (entirely my fault) that was resolved very quickly by a lovely gentleman on the phone. In terms of the food itself I gave some of my trial box to my mum's cats and they wolfed it down instantly, so I cant fault the food, my lads just very hard to please.
