reviews.title: Wow quality, wow design, best of all cat foods.
reviews.review_text: My cats are so picky and I've tried every cat food imaginable. Well they devoured the Marro pouches. I found freezing them and taking some out to thaw no hassle at all. I really appreciate the time and effort that's gone into the design and the "menu" just overall feels really special for the kitties. 12/10. Excellent product.

reviews.title: Marro is best
reviews.review_text: Before discovering Marro, my cat Luna was extremely fussy and almost never finished her food. Since switching, she’s been enjoying every variation, and for the first time she actually clears her bowl! She especially loves the pork recipe, it’s definitely her favorite. I’m so glad I found a brand that she truly enjoys and that gives me peace of mind about what I’m feeding her. Highly recommend Marro to anyone with a picky eater!
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's food has satisfied their extremely fussy cat, who now finishes her meals and has a favorite recipe, giving the owner peace of mind about the quality of the food.

reviews.title: 14 year old cat loves it
reviews.review_text: I've had my 14 year old cat on Marro for a few months now, and it's very noticably great for him! He loves the food, he's more energetic, he's gained a bit of weight, and importantly his poops are much less stinky. The customer service is great, and the subscription is easy to adjust if you need to!

reviews.title: From lukewarm to loyal—Marro has earned it.
reviews.review_text:
I previously gave Marro a lukewarm review due to concerns about packaging. But I’ve since learned that most of their packaging is already fully recyclable, and within the next week, all their pouches will be recyclable at larger supermarkets too. (Just a quick rinse and dry—easy.)
This matters to me. I’m genuinely happy to revise my review and commend the Marro team for listening, improving, and staying committed to both our pets and the planet.
And the food? Still the only one our three will eat consistently. That’s saying something.
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's commitment to recyclable packaging and high-quality food that their cats love consistently has impressed them.

reviews.title: Really impressed …
reviews.review_text: Really impressed with this new cat food. It smells so much fresher than the cheaper brands, which is a big bonus, and our cat switched over to it straight away. He used to only lick the jelly, but now he finishes the whole bowl every time. The little extras like serving forks and toys are a thoughtful touch and much appreciated. Highly recommend!

reviews.title: A nod of Approval

I’m pleased to report that Sheldon—my dearest feline companion who technically resides next door but has assumed an unofficial ambassadorship in my home, where he is affectionately known as “Felicity,” a name befitting his dignified presence—has most enthusiastically approved of MARRO.With all the gravitas of a seasoned gourmet, he samples every variety no fewer than three times a day—each meal a small ceremony of satisfaction. I, in turn, take great delight in watching him dine: munching with gusto, nodding in quiet approval at every bite, and offering the highest compliment imaginable—a gleaming, empty plate.
Sheldon (Felicity) and I would like to express our thank you to all MARRO and Couriers team for our sheer delights.

reviews.title: I’ll keep it simple
reviews.review_text:
I’ll keep it simple, since I’m not a cat! :blush: Service has been absolutely fantastic! While managing subscriptions could use a little more streamlining, everything else is going great.

Muffin is still lovin' her Sheba – she gets it twice a day (2x 85g) and even though it has a bit of a smell, she gobbles it up and never leaves a crumb behind! 

Marro joined us, and she devoured the chicken flavour (65g) in no time! She enjoys the other varieties too, though she leaves just a tiny bit, which she finishes off a few hours later. The food is fantastic – no smell at all, and it looks so appealing! Best of all, she feels fuller longer, which means those “I’m hungry again” antics have dramatically reduced!

At £51, it is a bit pricey, but I’m excited to keep a reduced subscription to complement her Sheba diet. Overall, it’s been a delightful experience! :star2:
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their cat loves the food, it has improved their cat's health, and the service has been fantastic, despite being a bit pricey.

reviews.title: Sheer Variety and ease
reviews.review_text: The variety of food and ability to change the proportions of the flavours depending on how cats are feeding at the time is brilliant. Deliveries are always as advertised and always on time. Most importantly the cats both love the food and enjoying having a choice - it also smells like it should rather than slop which is a really nice change.
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because they love the variety of food, flexibility in changing flavors, and reliable deliveries, which their cats thoroughly enjoy.

reviews.title: Marro is a game-changer
reviews.review_text:
Since changing my senior cats food to Marro approx 2 years ago, she has absolutely thrived. Far more energy and playfulness, and her coat is now shiny and in great condition. Her increased energy and activity means she has finally lost the excess weight she was carrying before. As Marro is fresh food and is kept in the fridge, I submerge the unopened pouch in hot water for 30 seconds to a minute to liquify the gravy and to bring the food up to a more palatable temperature for a cat (it is possible my cat is just fussy though). I never have to throw any food away as she eats it all. Customer service at Marro is astonishingly good.  My queries are addressed very quickly, and on the rare occasion there is a small error with my order, it is rectified promptly and generously. It really makes such a difference to have a friendly and approachable  team to contact. Georgia in particular has always been brilliant.
I highly recommend Marro to cat lovers everywhere. Your cat will love the change.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their senior cat thrived on Marro food, experiencing improved energy, coat condition, and weight loss, and they also received exceptional customer service from the company.

reviews.title: The absolute best

2. Without a doubt the best, kindest and personal company I have EVER dealt with. Their customer service is amazing. Very sadly we lost one of our cats in an RTC. I informed them and they sent a very quick, very personal message and a few days layer some flowers arrived from them.

reviews.title: Two happy and healthy cats!
reviews.review_text: We switched to Marro cat food this year (2025) and we’ve been very impressed! We have two cats and they were both quick to enjoy the food and still love it many months later. The quality and detail of the brand is excellent. One of our cats has a urinary health issue and the healthy content and cranberry included in Marro meals have meant that he’s had no recent flare ups at all! They love all the different flavours meaning we can rotate through them and they don’t get bored with the same flavour every day. We plan to stick with this food for as long as possible!
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because Marro cat food impressed them with its excellent quality and helped improve their cat's urinary health issue.

Overall very happy with the service and product from marro it's the only thing my fussy cat will eat . 

Thanks :+1::skin-tone-2:

reviews.title: Our gorgeous little kitten T-Rex was…
reviews.review_text: Our gorgeous little kitten T-Rex was underweight when we got him and also had diarrhoea. He would turn his nose up at any food we would try to offer him, we were lucky if he would lick the Jelly or Gravy it came in a little bit and leave the rest.  We were advised by our Vet to give him just chicken which did stop the diarrhoea but as soon as we re introduced any kitten food ( even sensitive tummy brands) he would get diarrhoea again.  Then I tried Marro and what a difference it has made.  He licks his bowl clean,  he absolutely loves the meals.  His poops are more solid, he’s more energetic and his coat is so shiny. We were really worried about him at one stage but now he’s filling out lovely.  He’s like a different kitten 10/10 for us.

reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's food transformed their underweight and diarrhoea-prone kitten into a healthy and energetic cat with a shiny coat.

reviews.title: So far so verrryyy good!
reviews.review_text: So far so verrryyy good! We get our dogs food regularly delivered (by another company) and so we thought it would make sense to do the same for our lovely cats. Using MARRO has been extremely easy, the cats absolutely love the food - a lot more than any they have tried before and they're not fussy cats by any means. Fresh food that we can store away in the freezer and grab when needed. The only complaint I would have and not even a complaint is that we would love for them to do dog food as well so we can get all our fur babies food sorted in one place!

reviews.title: Marro is SO CONVENIENT
reviews.review_text:
Marro is SO CONVENIENT and apparently SO TASTY!
Delivered frozen in flat, easily stored pouches, my cat, Mojito, is very fussy at age 15 and he gobbles up the chicken and turkey pouches. They look very juicy and he really enjoys them and is thriving despite his elderly age. 
I can pack the pouches in the freezer, bringing 2 or 3 out at a time into the fridge then bring out to room temperature the night before feeding and he loves it.
Over the years Mojito has gone on and off various foods but he seems to be stuck on Marro, thank goodness, making it very easy for me - home delivery once a month, no shopping, ease of storage and I can relax knowing Mojito will happily eat his food without turning his nose up and walking away from his feeding bowl, as has been the case with some supermarket brands in the past.
There is a wide choice too - all meats which cats need, and no horrid additives or fillers. 
Mojto is a very happy, well fed, elderly gentleman who still enjoys running in the garden chasing butterflies, enjoying life thanks to Marro. 
And their customer relations department is excellent.
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's convenient, high-quality, and tasty food has made their fussy 15-year-old cat thrive and happy, with excellent customer service to boot.

reviews.title: A paws up from Tom!
reviews.review_text:
A paws up from Tom!
We recently signed up to Marro having seen a tradestand at Chatsworth Country Fair. The staff seemed knowledgeable and the process to sign up was simple, with no strings attached. 
The food has been delivered quickly and is very well packaged - the process to change any order details is also intuitive and easy to manage.
But most importantly is the cat king of the household - a 16 year old grandee who is not afraid to turn his nose up at any food that doesn't meet his exacting standards. He is not a greedy cat - he has always tended to nibble at his food during the day, and not one to wolf it down or clear the dish. But - other than a slightly suspicious "what's this" when we first introduced Marro, he has quickly become a convert. Every dish is cleaned thoroughly and he appears regularly with his demanding "where's my next dish" meow. 
Based on our experience to date, would highly recommend.

reviews.title: Excellent quality cat food which always end with an empty dish, and a full belly (happy cats, happy me)
reviews.review_text:
I have Maine Coons and Ragdolls, who can all be fussy eaters. In recent times, I have noticed that conventional mass produced cat food brands have not left my cats satisfied. Regularly I would be throwing away more wet food than my cats would eat. This left me swapping brands and trying yet another one, and this led me to cooking the cats some of our human food, they would constantly sit waiting for our food, and leave behind whatever food I put down. It didn’t matter what price point food I bought, my cats would vote with their feet, and walk away, leaving yet another wasted box of cat food.
That was until we came across the Marro cat food. 
Initially we ordered Marro for one of our males who was in our opinion, the one who always ate dry food, wasn’t very interested in wet food…..until he tasted Marro.
He sat and waited until I put his food out, and ate it all every time. Our other cats became more interested in Roarys food, and would try and push him out of his bowl. I then gave three more of my cats the same food as Roary was having. The results are, I wish I found this brand much earlier.
My cats now have amazingly soft coats, we have no more smelly litter trays to empty out with runny motions, our cats have more energy, and I no longer have to throw away their uneaten food.
Marro arrives in a refrigerated cardboard box (which is very pretty and makes lovely cat play houses, so long as your cats are smaller than my Maine Coons :kissing_heart:). I put some pouches in the fridge and freeze the rest, taking them out each evening ready for the next day.
There is a choice of 5 different flavours, and when you put your initial enquiry through their website, they calculate the exact amount to feed your individual cats, depending on breed, size, weight and energy needs.
I highly recommend this food, it looks just like the food we prepare for humans, with all of the correct nutrients needed for our feline family members.
Any questions please feel free to drop me a message, however, Marro has an excellent website which easy to navigate with lots of information about the brand. 
I’m thrilled that I now have extremely happy cats who enjoy the food that Marro have created.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's high-quality cat food transformed their fussy cats' health and satisfaction, resulting in improved coats, energy, and digestion, with no more wasted food.

Really impressed with the care she showed to get this sorted. 
My cat really likes marro and in comparison to some of the other brands we have tried he eats more of it and the packaging is easier to store in the freezer. 
I am a very happy customer both with the food and product and your support team!

reviews.title: Perfect service and my cat loves Marro
reviews.review_text:
Spoke to Enis on the phone who helped me so much with my Marro account. He was friendly and clearly very knowledgeable with a genuine interest in cats. We had a lovely discussion whilst correcting an issue with my account. 

Marro as a company is easy to communicate with. With other brands, I've found it harder to reach them and get accurate human advice instead of automated bot instructions. 

My diva of a cat loves Marro! I've tried most of current UK quality / fresh cat food brands and she prefers Marro (every flavour, although this is customisable) over other quality brands like Untamed, which is by far more expensive. I store my cat's biweekly batch in the freezer and take out her daily meals to defrost in the fridge overnight. The food itself doesn't have a strong unpleasant smell.

I've noticed a positive change in my cat's behaviour and increased energy levels. Marro keeps her full for hours, so I don't have to wake up to meows at 7 am.

Recently I needed my cat's order sooner than expected and was able to get it two days later without calling, so overall everything works perfectly.

No complaints, I highly recommend!
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars due to the excellent customer service, high quality of Marro's cat food, and the positive impact it had on their cat's behavior and energy levels.

reviews.title: Can't say enough good things
reviews.review_text: Can't say enough good things. We were worried about our cat who has always been picky but was getting her food eaten by our other cat, and was just not eating enough of the wet food. Saw marro and decided it was worth a try. She loves it, crying for it at mealtimes. We even tried putting a bowl half with marro and half with felix as good as it looks which was the previous go to. She ate the Marro up to the dividing line and left the felix. I'm amazed as she's rejected so many supposedly better foods in the past. Delivery, packaging, thoughtful touches are all great. We're still supplementing with dry to get her weight up and I wish we could afford to give it to both cats, but no2 gets a few treats of it. I wish it was cheaper but the quality is obvious and better good food that's eaten than junk in the bin! Looking forward to box no 3.

Our first proper box arrived today and of course Bella and Elton are also very happy with their bigger Marro Mansion.

reviews.title: Honest review
reviews.review_text:
Honestly, when I first introduced this, my cats refused it and I felt like I had wasted my money and stuck it in the freezer with the intention to bin it. 
Months later, I saw it, tried it again and they loved it without question! Adding a sprinkle of their favourite freeze dried treat definitely helps. 
What I like most about this is that, unlike a similar competing brand (which I also rate highly), it only uses single source proteins so it's excellent for elimination diets or cats with allergies. 
I would love to see one which is while rabbit or whole mouse though.
categories: Took a While But Now Love It
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their cats eventually loved the food, particularly appreciating the high-quality single source proteins that make it suitable for elimination diets or cats with allergies.

The leafleting and text and extra goodies are so well thought out, you just know it's a passion project for the people behind the brand. More importantly, the food itself is a hit with my cat and you can tell a lot of research has gone into its makeup. It smells good enough to fry up, has none of that mass-produced jelly typical of standard brands, and the cat loves it so much she tends not to pine for food so often when she's had Marro that day. I think she feels satiated better with quality food. Also, as I say, I'm not one for subscriptions, so the fact that I can discontinue Marro deliveries when the belt tightens, and then continue them again with no issue, makes it really ideal for me. Just brilliant, thanks guys.

The beef seems to be Mistys preference at the moment but Tiger loves them all so far, he’s quite the foodie! 
I will edit the meals so they can not have fish in the next delivery that’s due. I love that this food is such good quality too! They’ve been eating this for a few days and their poop is already smelling better than it was! So glad I made the choice to order Marro!

This food has helped him gain weight again, his poos are normal, he's not sick daily like he was being. My other cats also love this food. I like that when it's hot I can offer it cold to cool them down, and then I can warm up when it's cold. I sometimes add extra water in to the food when it's hot and they don't notice. Their customer service is EXCEPTIONALLY GOOD. Overall I will continue to buy this, I never have any left overs, easy to give, portioned to suit their needs. I hope to see this company grow and try more if what they have to offer for my babies

reviews.title: Food fit for a fussy AF Bengal with digestion issues
reviews.review_text: We switched our 10 year old Bengal from a raw diet earlier this year for medical reasons. We need to maintain her health with a low fat alternative. Taste and bowl appeal are also a must given her extreme fussiness, and history of liver disease/feline anorexia after she was given the wrong (pouch) food instead of her usual raw diet, during a short cattery stay 7 years ago. We decided to try Marro and haven’t looked back. We now have a cat who calls for her food in a way she hasn’t done for a few years. She seems to have the energy levels of a cat half her age, and absolutely adores Marro. She chomps it down with gusto and, with the use of human grade meat which is gently steam cooked, it smells delicious even to our noses! Our cat has become more active again and seems almost to be de-ageing! It’s a pleasure to see her enjoy her food and we have the fantastic Marro to thank for that! Cannot recommend highly enough for quality food, fantastically easy and speedy ordering, and excellent packaging that can be recycled.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's high-quality, gently steam-cooked food has significantly improved their 10-year-old Bengal cat's health, energy, and appetite, making it a game-changer for their pet's overall well-being.

reviews.title: Please read this......
reviews.review_text:
First of all I have to praise Marro's customer service which is the best and genuinely friendliest I've ever experienced. How kind and helpful they were! Well done Marro! 
The cat food is flipping amazing, I could eat it myself and I reckon the cat is now eating better than me. I buy this for my dad's elderly cat and we reckon this food has definitely bought her some extra time. She is much happier, more relaxed, more content. She's even started grooming herself properly again and she no longer wakes my dad up at 6am to be fed.....she happily sleeps in now and my Dad has to wake her up! She eats all her portions, none of that licking-the-gravy-and-leaving-the-rest business. Indy is no longer crying for food all the time, you can tell she is totally satisfied. I can't believe how much it has changed her for the better. And she's only been eating it for 9 days!

Also, I love the way I am able to change subscription dates, pick and change the meals and change the amounts very easily on their website. My dad only has a tiny freezer in his fridge, but I was able to change the delivery to fortnightly too. 

Indy is now a happy, contented cat, my dad is now super happy and obviously so am I. So yes, I highly recommend this cat food and this company!

reviews.title: This food has changed our lives.
reviews.review_text:
My cat is a very fussy eater and I’m absolutely thrilled at how she has taken to this food and the change it has made to her life.
She has had such a tough time scratching. Her skin was always cut and scabby especially in the warmer months and has had to have steroid injections each summer to help suppress the irritation/allergies as nothing else worked.
This year since having ‘Marro’ is the first year she has not been tearing chunks of her fur out. Her skin is so smooth and lovely, I rarely see her scratch these days.
She is so much calmer and so am I cos it broke my heart seeing her suffer. 
Another plus is hardly any smell when going to the loo, so unlike before, my goodness it was bad.
Although I started her on Marro earlier this year, I’ve left my feedback until now, the month August, as I needed to know how she would be during the dreaded warmer months and she is perfect. Thank you so much I highly recommend to all.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro cat food has transformed their fussy cat's life, resolving skin issues and allergies, and improving overall health and well-being.

reviews.title: A truly compassionate company
reviews.review_text:
A truly compassionate company

Marro truly touched my heart. My old girl had IBS, and Marro was the only brand she not only enjoyed but that also didn’t upset her sensitive stomach. It made such a difference in her final months.

She sadly passed away a couple of days ago, and today I received flowers and a card from Marro. I was in tears — it was such an unexpected and deeply thoughtful gesture.

It’s rare to see this kind of compassion from a company. Thank you, Marro, for not only caring about our pets but about us too. That extra special touch meant more than words can say.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's compassionate customer service and high-quality food, which helped their cat with IBS, went above and beyond their expectations.

reviews.title: Marro gets my cats seal of approval
reviews.review_text:
I've spent a fortune on cat food only for my cat to turn her nose up at it, all of it. She licks the gravy or jelly off and leaves the meat. 

I was starting to get desperate, thinking that I would never find a food that she would actually eat, and then I discovered Marro.

I bought the trial pack for a little over £6 and tried the cat with her first taste of Marro yesterday.

I wasn't holding out much hope but she cleaned the bowl completely, and she's never done that, ever in the three months I've had her.

It looks like she absolutely loves this food and if she likes it then I like it and I'm so looking forward to receiving my next delivery probably more so than the cat is.
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their extremely picky cat, who had previously rejected all other foods, absolutely loved Marro cat food and cleaned the bowl completely.

reviews.title: Bought the trial box for my cat jigger…
reviews.review_text: Bought the trial box for my cat jigger after seeing plenty of videos on tiktok about this brand. I was a little skeptical at first as my cat has a habit of being a little fussy but we are now on day 6 of eating marro and he loves it! He’s excited every meal time, he definitely has a jump in his step, and his coat is much softer. I would recommend marro to any cat owner!

reviews.title: A more contented and relaxed cat!

He loves his new food slightly warmed up. Twm is a big fan of the chicken dish, he gets so excited when I cut the top off the pouch. He eats it with such love. It's made my month knowing he loves this food so much!! Excellent communication also from the team, very impressive

reviews.review_text: My cats love the fresh food.  It's well packaged and comes in handy portion sizes. reviews.title: Love this
reviews.review_text: The food is great; my cat loves it, her fur is shiny, nice solid poops that don’t smell. I actually think I could eat the food myself; it smells so good! Delivery is quick and in a nicely packed box with wool and ice pack. Great communication re delivery.

reviews.title: 100% sustainable and tasty food
reviews.review_text: At first I was unsure whether to sign up for this brand of food for my feline cats as I had tried so many in the past.  I kept reading what the difference was compared to other brands.  What caught my full attention was the human-quality ingredients.  The variety of different meats that would be suitable for my feline pets.  Marro did not dissapoint ar all, my pets instantly engaged and enjoyed the meals, it is tasty, and offers each of my cats the benefits of a fresh diet that supports well being.  The food is packed well and delivered with care.  The staff are so welcoming and helpful to any questions about the food and what is suitable.  I cannot find any fault and I have now found the best cat food that suits my cats, no more vomiting or diarrhea  issues just happy and contented cats that cannot wait for their next feed.  Both cats are happy and more playful.  I can only say the best for Marro, they tick every box and they are far and beyond.  Their ethics are impeccable to the core.  They care and have done so much to ensure our feline pets are fed the essential diet that is tasty and of fulfillment.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's human-quality ingredients and fresh diet transformed their cats' health, eliminating vomiting and diarrhea issues and making them happy and playful.

reviews.title: Fabulous Food
reviews.review_text: My cat Cody has Inflammatory bowel disease and malabsorption problems which means he's hungry all the time. He didn't like the fish but loves all of the meat choices. He eagerly eats 90% of what is on his plate which I give 3 times daily. The kitten sized portions are ideal in size. I am giving him other food too. Due to the disease he lost a lot of weight and muscle mass and was very thin. Since eating the Marro food he has visibly gained weight which I am over the moon about. He has monthly B12 injections and I can't wait for the vet to see his improvement, I'm sure he'll be delighted! Thank you Marro!
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because Marro's food helped their cat with Inflammatory bowel disease and malabsorption problems gain weight and show visible improvement in health.

reviews.title: Tilly went wild to get IN her new Marro…
reviews.review_text:
Tilly went wild to get IN her new Marro box (one gimlet eye staring out the window!) 
But the test came later (would she actually eat anything?). 
She hummed & haa-ed at first...then nibbled half the chicken pouch. 2nd half nibbled by morning...now for the beef. 
She is a madam, so nothing is certain yet, but it seems this company is doing all in its power to please its fussy customers. 
Paws up from me:black_cat::clap::skin-tone-3:

I would however suggest not using DPD or evri for delivery's to my area, as they are very unreliable and a friend of mine who uses marro who live down the road in jewellery quarter had their box go missing due to evri being careless during delivery!

reviews.title: Saved by Sporks – and a Brilliant Team!
reviews.review_text:
If you’re wondering whether to trust the Marro team with your pet’s happiness (and your sanity), let me tell you: they are absolute legends.

After a tragic spork incident (RIP), I reached out in desperation as my cat Baggins was on the verge of launching a full-blown mutiny. The team responded not only quickly, but with humour, warmth, and TWO replacement sporks, one for use, one for future “accidents” (looking at you, partner).

They handled everything with kindness, speed, and a healthy appreciation for feline drama. Communication was purr-fect, and they made me feel genuinely looked after, both me and His Royal Fluffness, Baggins.

Honestly, the best customer service I’ve ever received. 10/10 would trust them again in a spork-related emergency. Or any emergency, really.

Forever furrgiven,
Siobhan (and Mr. Baggins, Supreme Ruler of the Household) :feet:

reviews.title: Can’t fault it
reviews.review_text:
We have three cats, 2 will eat anything and 1 is a little fussy. All of them get on really well with the food, it being proportioned and sent straight to the house is super convenient, only hinderance is needing the freezer space for three cats worth of food! I’ve only had to speak to the customer service team a couple times but they are always helpful. We did receive the wrong box once however they sorted it the next day and suggested that, if we didn’t want to store the extra food, we donate it to a local shelter which we did :) 

It is a little on the pricier side, but smells like the actual meat it claims to be and after 9 months on it all of our cats are at the perfect weight and we haven’t had any issues with smelly poos.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits

reviews.title: Great food, service and delivery

An email comes out to let me know, in good time, when it is coming and it arrives we'll packaged with plenty insulation and ice packs to make sure that the pouches stay frozen even if you're out at work when it's delivered.  The food looks good quality and I take a few out of the freezer at a time to keep in the fridge.  When I want to use them I simply pop the sealed pouch into a cup or pan with some hot water for a few seconds to take the chill off before giving it to my cats.  I'm not a meat eater myself but I tell others that it looks like something you'd have in a pulled pork or beef sandwich!

reviews.title: The cat loves the food
reviews.review_text:
The cat loves the food, but enjoys her dried food too still.  We give her a mixture.
The packs arrive promptly although the standard delivery cycle assumes one pouch per day which doesn't allow for cats who eat 5-6 per week, or ties we are on holiday. We would prefer to reduce the frequency  slightly.  Also the pouches arent that easy to open in a way that the food is easy to serve. That said we always get a clean bowl which we never had with other cats on wet food before.
reviews.summary: The reviewer gives 5 stars because their cat loves the food, always finishing the bowl, despite some minor issues with delivery frequency and pouch packaging.

reviews.title: My cat was down to a healthy weight in 3 months
reviews.review_text: I have two cats and one was overweight and we needed to do something about it. I decided to try Marro and it’s been fantastic. It’s lovingly packed, arrives quickly and the cats adore it. Within 3 months he was down to a healthy weight and both cats looked so healthy. It’s really good quality food that takes them a little while to eat and keeps them full (unlike gobbling down a sachet of something from the supermarket). It’s pricey but you get fantastic quality for the price and compared to other premium cat foods the quality is right up there.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because Marro's high-quality food helped their overweight cat reach a healthy weight and improved the overall health of both cats.

reviews.title: Feed me now
reviews.review_text: The master seems to like your food but only if I don't heat it up too much.
reviews.summary: The reviewer's cat is particular about the food temperature, but likes Marro's food when prepared correctly, earning a 5-star review.

reviews.title: My 3 cats love Marro!
reviews.review_text:
My 3 cats love Marro so much! They've always been fussy and now they finally agree on something! Natural ingredients, real meat not that 4% cr*p by mars!
100% recommended!
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their previously fussy cats love Marro's natural ingredients and real meat, making it a hit with all three pets.

reviews.title: My cat was on KatKin for 3 years and…
reviews.review_text:
My cat was on KatKin for 3 years and she appeared to love it but would really only eat the chicken and then she stopped eating it altogether. As this had happened a couple of times before I had some Marro on hand that she had previously turned her nose up at, tried this time and she ate it all however she is still just on chicken. This was nearly a year ago and now she is still really enjoying it.

The bits she leaves go to the hedgehogs who also seem to enjoy it!
reviews.summary: The reviewer's picky cat, who previously stopped eating her old food, now enjoys Marro's chicken flavor and has been eating it consistently for nearly a year.

Cat seems very happy with it too.

Pleased to know that content is better quality than supermarket brands.

reviews.title: Purrfectly yummy!
reviews.review_text:
As a cat who has recently had a serious operation and have a new Mommy, I had a chat with her to see if there was a cat food delivery service which would provide good nutritional food for me to aid my recovery and help with my future as a 3 legged cat. Mommy explained to Marro that I may have joint problems in the future and can't afford to become pawtly.
Mommy says it is so easy to order I may be able to order by myself soon. She says they gave her great information and everyone is very helpful. I think it is very tasty, top quality and scrumptious. 
Thank you Marro.  
Lord Fluffington the 1st:feet::feet:
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because Marro provided top-quality and tasty food, along with helpful customer service, which aided in their cat's recovery and future health.

reviews.title: 10/10 from my cat & I :-)
reviews.review_text: My cat absolutely loves Marro's food! She'd completely gone off her supermarket cat food. Once she'd been on Marro for a few weeks I noticed a huge difference - her coat and eyes became more glossy, she was more friendly and had more energy and wanted to play outside more. She never begged for food before now, but at meal times there are plenty of Meows :-) The customer service is brilliant, very kind over email and helpful. Plus it's easy to pause a box! Highly recommend :-)
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because their cat's health and behavior improved significantly after switching to Marro's food, and they also received excellent customer service.

reviews.title: What a wonderful company to deal with!
reviews.review_text:
What a wonderful company to deal with on top of being great for your cats health!  We've received some lovely free gifts with orders such as a leather toy mouse, a tote bag and mixing fork, not to mention the cool cat mansion boxes it's delivered in!

We have an elderly cat, Dave, who has issues with skin irritation and frequently had an upset stomach leaving a messy stinky litter tray.  After switching to Marro, his skin cleared up, no more itchy scabs and fur pulling, his tray no longer stinks and all his movements are solid, he even regained a bit of his sparkle and mischief.

Unfortunately, after several months Dave has decided that this healthy eating lark isn't for him any more and is now refusing the Marro pouches so we've had to take a break but will hopefully be back.  

I do wish the food was cheaper but I can't put a price on my beautiful boys health.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's cat food significantly improved their elderly cat's health, resolving skin irritation and stomach issues, despite eventually being refused by the cat.

reviews.title: Complete turnaround in health
reviews.review_text:
My cat has asked (instructed) me to leave a review because he is very busy looking out of the window. Since eating the beef recipe from Marro, his bowel problem has currently resolved. This is a much greater thing than it seems as he has tried soo many different vet recommended anti-allergy foods in his 6 years. None has had this wonderful effect. Last year he nearly died due to an acute on chronic gut inflammation and to see him recover was such a blessing… then to find out about Marro and discover that the beef doesn’t cause his gut to flare up has been a complete change of quality of life for him ( and huge relief for me). He can’t eat chicken or turkey and so many companies mix these components into their food that he has been severely restricted ( I have in the past, had to resort to Soy based food to stop the bloodstained diarrhoea), which, with him being an obligate carnivore, did not sit well with me. 
His coat is better, he has gained weight, he now washes his own face and bum ( this has previously been delegated to me, the servant). He has much more energy and is enjoying his life. He must also feel so much better now he has one formed poo per day instead of 4-5 bouts of the runs. This has been a long journey but we are so very happy with this food and very relieved. I hope he remains stable now.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's beef recipe resolved their cat's long-standing bowel problem, resulting in significant health improvements and a better quality of life.

reviews.title: This food is a godsend
reviews.review_text: One of our elderly cats has long term pancreatitis. We’ve tried umpteen different foods over the years but since he’s been on Marro he’s much improved. His weight is now back to normal, well in fact he’s turned into a bit of a porker. He used to love his food when he was younger and he’s never had that appetite for years until now. His litter tray usage is also better. Can’t recommend marro enough.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer's elderly cat with pancreatitis showed significant health improvements, including weight gain and better litter tray usage, after switching to Marro cat food.

reviews.title: wonderful company marro
reviews.review_text: I used to have marro for my cat, she did so well on it, gained weight and a shiny coat and generally less hungry.  I stopped having marrow for a while.  Cat went back on shop bought sugary pouches, always hungry even though she was having 3 to 4 pouches a day and dry biscuits,  lost weight again.   Decided to go back to marrow, she is on only two of their pouches a day and a few biscuits, she has gained weight already and is less hungry no more annoying meowing because she is hungry on sugary pouches from the supermarket.   Marro is all meat and no sugar. I am very happy and would highly recommend

reviews.title: Icarus here
reviews.review_text:
Icarus here, just tapping on the old iPad to leave my review. Well fellow felines it took me a while to get my humans to realise I needed the dedicated nutrition as those pesky canines I let live in my home. What can I say? Well my coat is even more lustrous, my eyes shine brighter than the stars and my agility makes parkour look like kittens play. My servants follow the instructions of serving it slightly warm and I eat it with all the eagerness of an appreciative cat. So it costs a bit more, they don’t care because I actually eat it all.
I suggest you protest until they change from whatever rubbish your servants are tricking you into eating.

reviews.title: Quality and well thought out
reviews.review_text: Not the cheapest subscription service out there, but you get what you pay for. My cats thoroughly enjoy Marrow and I like the fact the pouches are easy to empty (without lots getting stuck inside) they stack easily and neatly in the freezer and that I can get 4 or so out at a time and let them slowly defrost in the fridge - never seem to have that, 'oh crap, forgot to get one out' moment. The box that turns into a 'cat pad' is also genius - I take a bit of the wool wadding from out of the packaging and put that in there too. Made to measure :heart_eyes:

reviews.title: I was sceptical about trialling a new…
reviews.review_text: I was sceptical about trialling a new cat food, but this product has genuinely made a huge difference. Our cat is 8 years old and has always vomited most days of the week without any clear reason; this has all stopped since feeding him Marro. His bowel movements no longer smell, his fur is not matted and he isn't sick. It has taken him a while to get used to the food, but I honestly feel shop bought cat foods were clearly upsetting his gut and bad for his health.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
Took a While But Now Love It

reviews.title: Good quality cat food and a lovely customer focused company
reviews.review_text:
I wanted to get good food for my cats, as the ingredients in the supermarket brands are disappointing and not very healthy.  I found Marro and gave them a try.  Firstly, the packaging is lovely.  The food is well packed, and chilled with ice packs (which can be used again for other things), wrapped in wool insulating sheets, so it arrived in perfect condition.  I loved that the box is set up to be something for the cats to explore, and the insulating wool is a very popular blanket in the box.  My cats have spent a long time playing and sleeping in that.  The information included is really helpful and fun. All of these little things are great, but the real reason for getting it is the food.  My cats have licked the bowl clean every time.  They were good eaters anyway, but they would sometimes leave a bit.  Not now, and I feel good that I'm giving them something healthy.
When I phoned Marro to ask a question, I got to talk to a lovely lady called Tasha who was really helpful. She showed an interest in my cats, and she clearly cares about the company.  It is so nice to speak to real people to answer queries, and especially when they are so knowledgeable about their products. 
It isn't the cheapest cat food, compared to those available in supermarkets, but for the quality and the content of meat and other natural healthy ingredients, it is much better value, in my opinion.  
If a natural healthy food for your cats is what you are looking for, Marro is certainly worth a try.
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because they were impressed with the high-quality ingredients and natural healthy content of Marro's cat food, as well as the excellent customer service they received.

reviews.title: Marro is the cat's whiskers
reviews.review_text: My two senior cats (16 and 14) had a Marro trial and loved it straightaway. They get really excited at meal times and gobble up their food with obvious pleasure. We all found the switch to Marro easy; they love it and it's no problem to keep some pouches in the freezer with the rest in the fridge. I warm their pouches up in a cup of hot water and as soon as they hear the kettle boiling they come running and can't wait for me to serve it up. I'm continuing with the subscription after the trial and have opted for the more frequent deliveries every two weeks as I've not enough space in my freezer for four week's worth of food. My cats both seem healthier; more energetic; more interested in what's going on around them and their coats are softer; shinier and they're not shedding as much. Their poops are also smaller and a lot less pongy! I think Marro is good value for money, even though it's a bit more expensive than their previous brand, because it's tailored to their age; activity levels and weight plus they're not leaving any to go to waste as they did previously and it's definitely improved their overall health and wellbeing.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their senior cats not only loved Marro's food from the start, but also showed significant health improvements, including increased energy, softer coats, and better digestion, making it good value for money despite being more expensive.

reviews.title: Solved dinner time for a fussy cat!
reviews.review_text:
My cat Toffee has always been super fussy and after her usual brand of dried food changed its shape and recipe she utterly rejected it.  I was struggling to find a replacement that she would accept and came across the Marro stand at the Foodies festival.
After chatting with the representative I decided to give the trial box a punt.  My cat has always previously rejected wet food but I was desperate to try anything.
The box arrived quickly and was really well packed with cool blocks to keep it fresh.  
We were honestly amazed at how much Toffee seemed to like the food, every flavour except the Turkey!  We only give her half a sachet at each sitting as she was leaving about that much each time we fed her, so half morning and evening seems to be perfect for her, supplemented with some new biscuits that she seems to be ok with to snack on if she's peckish while we are out.
I have ordered my first full box now and it is still going down well.  There was an issue with the delivery, however the communication and resolution from Marro was superb.  
I highly rate the ethics and customer service of this company and their super friendly staff, and my cat highly rates their food!
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's food was a hit with their extremely fussy cat, and the company's customer service was superb in resolving a delivery issue.

reviews.title: Excellent for fussy cat, high quality,  no waste
reviews.review_text:
I admit, I was dubious about getting a subscription box for our very fussy old cat. Having thrown out more food than he was eating for months, I thought I'd give Marro a try.

Our cat gives it 5 out of 5 stars.  He's eating every scrap - unheard of in the past few years - and is eating as soon as I put the dish down.  I did start microwaving the food as suggested but he's just as keen if it's straight out of the fridge.  He's gained weight, is full of energy and is looking much more like his younger self. 

It's easy to store the food, we don't have a huge freezer but 4 weeks' worth of food only takes up half a tray of it.  It defrosts quickly so there's no need to have a lot of pouches out at once, I normally get 4 or 5 days' worth out to put in the fridge which works well for us.

Delivery is excellent, it arrives still frozen and it then goes straight in the freezer.

We started out giving our cat 130g a day, but a very helpful phone call from Marro after a few days meant the next box supplies 180g a day which seems to be a better amount for our cat.  It's easy to amend orders including increasing or decreasing the daily amount. 

Overall, I'd definitely recommend Marro, and we will probably go onto this for our other cats as it is high quality food and so easy to use.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's high-quality food has transformed their fussy cat's health and eating habits, with excellent customer service and convenient delivery.

reviews.title: Frosty loves Marrow – so do we!
reviews.review_text:
We started our kitten Frosty on Marrow as soon as we got him at eight weeks old, and he’s been loving it from day one. The website is super clear and easy to use, and there’s a great variety of wet food pouches to choose from—we actually picked all of them because Frosty enjoys every single one!

From the first meal, he cleaned his plate, and we’ve been impressed with the quality of ingredients. The food is packed with all the right nutrients, salmon oil, and it supports a high-protein diet—perfect for a growing kitten. The packaging and marketing are also great; Frosty especially loves the little boxes the food comes in!

10/10 would recommend Marrow to any cat parent looking for quality, convenient, and nutritious food.
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because they were impressed with the quality of Marro's ingredients and nutrients, which supported their kitten's high-protein diet and overall health from day one.

reviews.title: I'm a convert - 15yo picky kitty loves it
reviews.review_text: I was sceptical at first as my 15yo kitty is a very picky eater and trying out different other fresh food options, I wasn't persuaded and had to return some of the food previously. However with Marro, seems like she can't get enough, from the get go she was begging for more. Moreover being older kitty her poo tended to be more liquid and I can see positive change after less than a month of use - her poo got harder and really smells less. I am a convert, will keep ordering it until she eats it; the only issue is 2 65g pouches a day don't seem enough, I am trying to give her 3 and let's see how will she feel about it. So yes, I very much advise trying Marro and seeing for yourself :) We are converts!
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer's 15-year-old picky cat not only loved Marro's food from the start, but also showed significant health improvements, particularly in her digestion, within less than a month of use.

They are also in love with the box it arrives in, the mansion. Ever since she’s been my point of contact and she is genuinely brilliant as are the rest of the wonderful team. I love how Marro hire people who are equally as obsessed with cats :feet::heart:

reviews.title: 5 meal selections of 60g
reviews.review_text:
5 meal selections of 60g, beef, pork, turkey, chicken and fish. Daily recommended amount is 120g and daily cost over £2. 

The pouches arrive frozen and I store them in the freezer. I place two pouches in the fridge for the following day. You can order every two weeks, 4 weeks  or 6weeks. 

I found if I warmed them in the microwave for 10 seconds my cat preferred them. It’s really trial and error to find out which recipes the cat preferred and that is important considering the cost. 

My cat is a grazer so has access to Hills Science Plan throughout the day, I feed him wet food early morning and before bed. 

The product is not cheap and although you can see the quality of the meat, there’s not a lot of it. 

He didn’t dive straight into it either so having completed the trial period, I’m just feeding him once a day (60g) with the Marro untilI’m absolutely sure of what he enjoys and will continue to feed him with his complete food, fresh fish or meat until I’m confident of what he enjoys and the order I place won’t be wasted. Too expensive to waste. Although Marro suggested I take away all his food so that’s he’s hungry, that approach is not one I choose to do. 

So I’ve ordered 14 days of pouches to see how he goes but plan to make them last 28 days initially, that means I’ll skip the next order and place an order for 14 pouches once a month, one a day. Once I’m confident he’s enjoying his meals and which flavours he prefers then it will be 14 pouches every two weeks but I think a trial month a fairer time scale.
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because they appreciate the high-quality ingredients and flexibility of Marro's cat food, which their fussy cat has started to enjoy after a trial period.

reviews.title: Good high quality meat & gravy my cat loves
reviews.review_text:
Good food my cat loves. He has lost one of his top canine teeth and hasn't enjoyed chewing on soft stuff since, prefers high quality high meat biscuits. BUT Marro food he loves if I whizz it in a pan using a hand blender to make it more liquid and add a bit of luke-warm water too, so it's a thick soup. He LOVES it and I love that it's good human grade meat. The one not so good batch of just the beef sachets, had gristle and not so good bits of animal tissue in it, so I reported it back to the Marro team and they refunded me and are now on the case to investigate and renew their high standards. SO excellent customer service too! (Thanks to Tasha for her help :blush:) I highly recommend this company, well designed delivery packaging to protect frozen food, very convenient to just thaw what you need and leave rest in freezer. All food sachets and packaging recyclable and what's more my cat loves lying on the natural sheep wool liners to the delivered parcel as a cosy mat ...loves the natural smell and feel and especially if I sprinkle a teaspoon of quality dried cat nip over it.
:smile_cat::feet::sparkling_heart:

I wish this firm an excellent future

reviews.title: Paws up from a fussy eater
reviews.review_text:
I have recently tried Mabel (my very fussy foodie cat) with Marro and she absolutely loves it. She licks every plate clean.
I also liked the look of it, as it looks and smells like proper meat, not like some of the cat foods I have come across in the past !!
I had a query regarding the content % of some of the ingredients in the food (Mabel has so many food allergies) and I e mailed Marro to ask. They came back to me with a very detailed analysis within 24 hours, which impressed me, firstly because they took the time to reply and secondly to give me such a detailed response. Very good customer service.
All in all, Mabel has given Marro the thumbs (or should that be paws) up and I have to say, I agree with her !!

reviews.title: My Bengal absolutely lives this food
reviews.review_text:
My Bengal absolutely lives this food 
He’s very picky & mostly walks away from all other food with Marro he growls if the other cat comes near when eating it 

Hope he doesn’t go off it - it’s not a cheap food but makes me happy seeing my boy enjoying his meals 

Love the little treats we get sent too with the box each month
reviews.summary: The reviewer's picky Bengal cat loves Marro's food, enjoying meals and even being protective of it, making the owner happy despite the higher cost.

reviews.title: Small sachets are big in this cat
reviews.review_text: Poppy cat love her food, but she can go off well-prepared wet food if it's too tedious. She likes variety. So repetition and large portions lead to boredom and throwing food away, something neither of us appreciate. Marro have the edge on those two aspects - their sachets are small, so you can swap easily between different flavours, and their cooking is excellent - their "gravy" is clever, both healthy and mouth watering. The only thing she won't eat is fish. She'll only eat white fish, and then only if it's come from a fish and chips shop (not really my choice, she just gets very interested if I bring any home!) NB: Marro - stop putting salmon in your fish dishes. Have you seen how badly farmed it is? I don't think it's that healthy to feed anybody. Other than that, Marro have reached the top of my  estimation. Poppy stays their biggest fan, and she's much happier. Her favourite flavours? Everything except fish.
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's cat food offers variety, excellent cooking, and healthy ingredients, which has made their fussy cat, Poppy, much happier.

reviews.title: Socks is a fussy eater but loves this!
reviews.review_text: Socks is a fussy eater and I have to give her a variety of flavours every day. But she loved the new Marro salmon and chicken so much that she ate it all, four days running!
reviews.summary: The reviewer's fussy cat, Socks, loved Marro's salmon and chicken flavors, eating them for four days straight, earning the company a 5-star review.

reviews.title: Marro food and experience
reviews.review_text:
Got introduced to this company last week by a lovely lady called Ruth. Ruth made things very easy by setting everything up for my young cat Bingo and made me feel very comfortable. 
Bingo is loving her Marro food and it is definitely filling her up then when I was giving her just biscuits. 
It’s great that you can sort all the fresh order out online app and is very easy, when it arrives it’s packed out with all cool packs and rapped in sheep’s wool to keep it cool, you can also keep it and let you cat have a bed out of it and you can also keep the box as a little house for them to go in. Also a lovely gesture of a toy for you cat. Very cute

We have to be creative and either mix the flavours, add cooked chicken or if that fails give him a couple of days break from it but once he's back on it he devours it no problem.

reviews.title: You won’t be dissapointed!
reviews.review_text: I have been using Marro for months now. Initially, only one of my cats ate it and now the second one who used to be really fussy about it, always eats the other one’s food so I guess it’s safe to say both my cats eat Marro. What I noticed immediately was the less smelly poops which when feeding royal canin were bad. They seem to be really energetic, looking forward to their next meal and the food is always fresh. No more changing the food every 2-3 weeks cause they get sick of it and finally on a constant. I recommend 100%
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gives 5 stars because Marro's fresh and high-quality food has improved their cats' health, energy, and digestion, and even their fussy cat now eats it willingly.

reviews.title: 5 stars!
reviews.review_text:
5 stars!
We've been using Marro for several months now and couldn't be happier. The quality of the food is fantastic—our cats are healthier, have shinier coats, and actually get excited when it's mealtime. The convenience of the subscription has made our lives so much easier, especially with such a big feline family.

We have 10 cats, so we go through quite a bit of food, and Marro has been reliable and consistent with every delivery. One small suggestion: it would be amazing if Marro could consider offering a multi-cat household discount—it would really help families like ours who care deeply about their pets but also have a bigger crew to feed!

Thanks, Marro, for keeping our fur babies happy and well-fed!
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's high-quality food has improved their cats' health and the subscription service has made managing their large feline family's meals convenient and reliable.

reviews.title: Not cheap but worth it for the quality
reviews.review_text: I changed my cat to Marro just after we lost our older cat as she wouldn’t eat Katkin any more. It took her a while to settle to any food but when she did it was Marro she was eating best. I love the packaging too. Easy to use and easy to wash out to recycle. It isn’t cheap but if you work out what you pay on supermarket cat food, it’s not that much more expensive but far exceeds those brands in meat content and quality
categories: Took a While But Now Love It
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because their cat, who was initially hesitant, eventually settled on Marro cat food, which they believe offers high-quality ingredients and good value despite being slightly more expensive than supermarket brands.

reviews.title: Fussy old cat
reviews.review_text:
Our cat is 16 years old and over the last few years has lost most of his teeth and became fussier and fussier about food.  We tried many different brands of food and he would eat them for a couple of days and then turn his nose up, he was losing weight and I was just trying everything out there. 
Marro kept popping up on instagram so I thought I'd give it a go and we are now on our third box and not looking back.  We haven't weighed him yet but he is looking healthier and he is cleaning his bowl everyday. He has become very vocal for his food, could almost think he is saying "Marro"

reviews.summary: The reviewer gives 5 stars because Marro cat food has improved their 16-year-old cat's health and appetite, despite being fussy and having previously rejected other brands.

reviews.title: Awesome company and product
reviews.review_text:
Not only is this food great, and my exceedingly fussy cat loves it, but their Customer service is 2nd to none.

No matter what reason you have to contact them, be a problem, a compliment, a change of address or change of frequency, they are exceedingly professional, kind, courteous, know what they’re talking about, and genuinely care about their customers (that being our cats LOL)

I cannot recommend them highly enough, your food arrives with freezer packs within 24 hours of dispatch and they go straight in the freezer. I get mine out the day before they required and leave them in the fridge to defrost in their own time. And whether warmed or cold, my cat loves it.

reviews.title: Extremely fussy senior cat loves Marro food

So much food has been wasted over the years. Not anymore thanks to Marro! There’s nothing to throw away now. Marro food has shown beginning signs of firming up her constant loose and smelly stool too. Marro has been a complete game changer so far. Thank you Marro!

It’s just so nice to see him enjoying his food and not having to throw lots away. So, although Marro is more expensive per packet it is excellent value and probably doesn’t actually work out more costly as we’re not wasting food anymore…

reviews.review_text: Efficient packaging & delivery in terms of Marro. The DPD courier isn't great and as it has happened with other deliveries in the past, just dropped the boxes in the ground floor hallway of the apartment building without even ringing the bell. If this continues, I would have to cancel my subscription as I had to do with some other companied where delivery was done by DPD. However, didn't want to discount Marro rating because of that as their food, packaging and service is great. My 2 ragdolls love Marro food!

I highly recommend this service, both for the kind and effective service and the high quality and nutritious meals. No regrets at all switching to Marro after using a more expensive alternative with poorer quality packaging. Would recommend to anyone looking to move away from hyper processed supermarket cat food to high quality healthy mealtimes!

reviews.title: Great product

Great product. I wasn’t sure a shift in diet would do much for our babies, but it’s night and day between store bought. Even other top tier brands like royal canine don’t compare to this. Hell, I’d eat it if I was hungry enough. 

But the most impressive thing is our cats aren’t scratching the door for food or begging anymore. They are actually satisfied! I don’t see this in humans tbh never mind cats. They have their meal and a quick zoom and that’s it, I actually think it’s enriched their lives a lot. 

P.S. they still use the first order box as a little den!

 Very happy with this company, their ethos and their readiness to help with any queries always promptly and with humour too.

reviews.title: I absolutely love Marro (and my fussy…
reviews.review_text: I absolutely love Marro (and my fussy cats do too). The branding and packaging are gorgeous (I always look forward to receiving the Marro box, It speaks “quality”). It comes with lovely free gifts which is a nice touch. More importantly the cat food seems a very good quality, smells good, nice texture and the contents are everything I you would want for your cats- high meat content no veg protein which is hard to find). I normally put the pouches in warm water for a minute and my cats always wait by my side impatiently. They really like it (and they are fussy eaters). There are 5 varieties and my cats like all of them. You can choose the variety you want and the frequency of delivery. The communication is always very good. Im kept informed about deliveries and reminders of the deadline for changes. Overall I would highly recommend Marro as a great choice for fresh quality wet cat food. I feel that the price provides good value for money as well.
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their fussy cats love Marro's high-quality wet cat food, which has a high meat content and no vegetable protein, making it a great value for money.

reviews.title: Definitely worth a try
reviews.review_text:
My two cats seem to love this food, the bowls are always completely clean afterwards and when it’s warmed up they used to both sit waiting for their bowls. I would recommend other cat owners trying their cats with this food. 

I have recently had to contact the customer service, to ask that one of my cats plans could be removed due to the loss of one of them and the customer service was really good. I had a really kind and understanding reply from Brendon, he went above and beyond. I was really surprised to come one to the lovely gesture of a sympathy card and gift for my loss and it was very much appreciated.
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars due to their cats loving the food and the exceptional customer service they received, particularly from Brendon, who showed kindness and understanding during a difficult time.

reviews.title: As previous Katkin buyers
reviews.review_text: As previous Katkin buyers, we started having problems with Katkin quality and the changed recipes no longer agreed with our cat with gastro issues - despite Katkin being what fixed her issues in the first place, so we were keen to try something different and Marro has been a lifesaver! The prices are more reasonable, and the quality/packaging has been such an improvement from what we were getting with Katkin. Our cat with gastro issues has improved so much that we also decided to put our other cat on Marro as well, and this has made a huge difference in her too. We are super impressed, and all of the Marro staff have been wonderful, and so helpful. Nothing is ever too much and any issues are fixed ASAP. So we will continue to support this excellent growing business!
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's high-quality food and excellent customer service have significantly improved their cats' health issues, particularly gastro problems, and provided a better experience than their previous cat food brand.

reviews.title: MARRO WELL WORTH TRYING : Cats are notoriously fussy so…
reviews.review_text:
Cats are notoriously fussy creatures so I cannot guarantee that your cat will love Marro. All I can say is that my ancient, poorly  and frail prince loves every flavour he has tried. We have been almost exclusively feeding Marro for 6 months now 
Things we like:
1)TRIAL  pack to see if we like it
2) Extensive INSTRUCTIONS  for transition 
3) There is COMPLETE FLEXIBILITY.  Yes , you need to sign up for regular deliveries , but you can then delay or change the date. I have done this several times , even with the same order. As I said my cat is old and he has had a chronic condition for some years ( long before we signed up to Marro) , so some days he does not want to eat two pouches ( the recommended portion supplied) So often the two weeks supply lasts us three or four weeks, I just delay the despatch date on my account details. 
3) There is also flexibility with FLAVOURS ordered , we are forever changing the mix we order to allow for Charlie’s whims. His current favourite is Turkey so he order more of that flavour and less of the others 
4)QUALITY :  I should have put this first really.  The quality of this food is, in my opinion fabulous , it is nearly all meat no stupid fillers and things with long names that aren’t really food. I haven’t tried to eat it myself ( I’m vegetarian!) but if I ate meat I think I’d be tempted ! 
5) CUSTOMER SERVICE in my experience  is brilliant and personal and kind ( as I said Charlie isn’t a well boy) 
6) EVERYTHING :slightly_smiling_face:

As I said , I don’t promise your cat will like Marro but I definitely recommend they try it.
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their fussy and frail cat loves Marro's high-quality food and they appreciate the company's excellent customer service and flexible subscription options.

reviews.title: Marro Cat Food
reviews.review_text:
My foster cat Toffee is a very fussy eater and suffers with a sensitive stomach. I came across Marro when they had a stand in Worthing town centre, and after a discussing Toffee's needs, decided to try the food.
To my surprise Toffee ate the food straight away without any fuss. He has since back tracked a bit and turns his nose up, but I am persisting following the advice given, and understand that it can take a while for cats to adjust. :cat2:
categories: Took a While But Now Love It
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their fussy foster cat Toffee, who has a sensitive stomach, initially ate Marro's food without fuss, and they're persisting with the advice given despite some later hesitation.

reviews.review_text: We had a year long nightmare trying to find a food that our extremely fussy cat would eat and Marro was the answer. He now eats just Marro, no more biscuits and his energy is amazing, his coat is brighter and the persistent eye irritation he had since we rescued him has disappeared! Aside from the cat food the customer service is incredible, it’s so nice to see a brand doing such a great job - well worth the money, thanks!!!

reviews.title: Marro cat food

reviews.title: Success!
reviews.review_text: My cat was eating whiskas the first few months I had her but then she decided she didn't like it anymore. She'd eat a little bit then walk away. Sometimes she would just look at it and walk away. So I tried several other similar brands. She'd eat for a couple of days then stop eating it. Then Marro popped up on my Instagram. I thought I'd try it. The sachets came chilled so I left 1 of each flavour in the fridge and froze the rest. When I opened the first sachet she came straight over and sniffed it. She ate a little bit and walked away. Then after eating her biscuits she came back and ate some more meat. It's been a few weeks now and she is still eating it. She doesn't always finish a sachet but she eats most of it. Her favourite is pork.
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their previously picky cat, who had stopped eating other brands, consistently eats and enjoys Marro's food, especially the pork flavor.

reviews.title: It may cost more but it’s worth it!
reviews.review_text: Marro is a business/company with a difference. They actually care and listen to their customers, which, I find is quite rare. Yes, it can be be more pricey than shop bought cat food but the quality and the results are far superior than most. My cat Wee Annie has not grumbled at all and she is a hard one to please. So thank you Marro and if you are unsure whether your cat will be as happy as Wee Annie then get yourself a sample pack. You and your car will not be disappointed!
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's high-quality cat food pleased their fussy cat, Wee Annie, and they appreciated the company's customer-centric approach.

reviews.title: Bella’s Story
reviews.review_text: Since 2022, I have owned a rescue cat called Bella. She had a traumatic experience when her owner died and at the age of 8, she was given to the RSPCA to be rehomed. She was living in a stressful environment with dogs barking and other cats around her she began to pull fur and was so anxious. Once she settled with us, we noticed that she was sick a lot and whatever I fed her she would be sick every few days, sometimes 3 times a day. She would also not eat everything I put out for her and wasted a lot of food. Nothing would help her, even the vets had no solution. That was until she started with Marro. Now she has not been sick for 10 days. I know it’s early days, but this is a miracle! She settled down to eating the food quickly and I followed the seven tips that came with the taster box. I’m delighted that she has reacted so well to it and we are on to our first box of food for the month. It’s easy to make changes to the delivery date and what is in the box. Bella loves the chicken, pork and turkey varieties best. I couldn’t recommend Marro highly enough and it has made such a difference to my life as well as Bella’s.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's food has made a significant improvement in their cat's health, resolving sickness and anxiety issues after trying other foods failed.

reviews.title: Worlds Fussiest Cat
reviews.review_text: My cat Millie has always been incredibly fussy to the point that she will go days without eating and then she would eat mainly out of hunger, have always had biscuits down but usually ignores them, I know she’s really hungry when she eats them. I was not convinced when I signed up for Marro as have tried other online fresh food before and battled for several days to get her to eat it but with no luck. I started with small tastes as recommended and the first time she walked away from it. I felt frustrated again so left it down and then a short while later I noticed her eating it, gave her some more and she ate every bit, the plate was licked clean! I tried all the flavours and she loves all of them, I was amazed so well done to Marro. You have quite possibly cracked the worlds fussiest cat.
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's food was able to win over their extremely fussy cat, Millie, who now loves all the flavors and eats every bit.

reviews.title: Great (and healthy) for fussy cats
reviews.review_text: My elderly cat started being extremely fussy after eating anything all her life. We had always fed her high quality tinned food, but she started refusing it. We tried a number of other foods (including another fresh food brand), but she might eat them for a couple of days, and then refuse again. Marro was yet another attempt which I did not hold out much hope for, but miraculously she liked it, and liked it for weeks! She has her favourites (chicken and turkey), but I have not tried the fish ones yet. I’m going to make up my next order accordingly. I love it that you can change the dates, amounts and contents of the box. As an added bonus I use the packaging wool to line hanging baskets, although it is a race between me using it and the jackdaws pinching it for their nests! Highly recommended.

reviews.title: My cat loves it
reviews.review_text: Well, my cat loves it. I switched from katkin where she was fond of certain flavours. But with Marro, my cat eats and loves them all. And food smells quite nice actually (this is my view but I am sure my cat agrees too). Also little touches are lovely  like having the box in the shape of a house with a cat entry hole plus the call I received shortly after I subscribed to check how things are.
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their cat loves all the flavors of Marro cat food and they appreciated the company's thoughtful touches, including a unique box design and a welcoming phone call.

reviews.title: One catisfied customeower!
reviews.review_text: My cat didn't hesitate - he got stuck right into his lovely new food!
