reviews.title: The website is easy to navigate
reviews.review_text:
The website is easy to navigate, the questions to make sure your cat gets the best diet suited to them is easy. Ordering was simple.
It's recommended that you change from your usual diet to marro gradually over a few days, warm the food slightly to make it more appealing if they are fussy which my boy is. However, he like it instantly and now turns his nose up to anything else, he seems calmer and more satisfied I'm thrilled.
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their fussy cat instantly loved Marro's food, which has also improved their cat's satisfaction and calmness.

reviews.title: The perseverance is worth it.
reviews.review_text:
Oreo is now on his third box and loves meal times, however during his trial box there was a point where I was about to give up. He would climb up the kitchen drawers to try and get to the food as he liked the smell, but was then too wary to try it, and I guess like humans who enjoy takeaways it is difficult to get used to healthy alternatives and detox from the junk. After a few days and by following the advice Oreo is now demolishing his food. 
The changes in his coat are really noticeable- it is incredibly soft and healthy, plus he demands less treats during the day and just seems happy and content. Well worth persevering to get to this stage.
categories: Took a While But Now Love It
Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because their cat, Oreo, initially took time to adjust to the new food but eventually loved it and showed significant health improvements, particularly in his coat.

reviews.title: Signed up for the trial box for our…
reviews.review_text:
Signed up for the trial box for our puss as we are always looking for a high meat (human grade) content grain free food for her.  

Trail box contained a mix of all flavours so she could try them all, as I suspected she only liked the beef and pork but it was good try them all as you never know with cats! 

Following the trial I opted for the small box (2 weeks) delivery option as we intersperse her food with two other brands throughout the day, so this lasts us about a month.  Also our freezer is small so we can't have a full months supply, so a 14day / two week delivery works great for us as you can move the delivery date as you need to.  Website and e-mail reminders sent out about deliveries are great for this.

Customer service has been excellent Brandon is always quick to respond and help answer questions.

If you sign up for a trial (as with other cat food online suppliers) just remember you need to either pause or cancel the subscription other wise you will get another delivery! We paused ours until we were sure she would like it.

Darcey is very happy with Marro though as a typical cat she has taken a while to fully move to a brand of new food.
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because they were impressed with Marro's high-quality ingredients, excellent customer service, and convenient subscription options that catered to their cat's needs and their own storage limitations.

reviews.title: It certainly was ‘love at first bite’ I…
reviews.review_text:
It certainly was ‘love at first bite’ I couldn’t even empty the packet fast enough before her little head nudged me out the way! 
My elderly cat used to whine all day for food even after feeding her. She seems so much more content now and is living the life, snuggled up in her new little house! Need to post a photo .. Adorable. Your Marketing and attention to detail makes feeding my little Spice, so much less of a chore! Loving the little gift too.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their elderly cat, who was previously whiny and discontent, is now happy and content after eating Marro cat food, indicating a positive impact on her health and well-being.

reviews.title: Would recommend Marro
reviews.review_text:

I need to change order, amount and pouch sizes, something I wasn’t able to do myself on the website. Customer service amended my account before next box that was due in 2 days. Really helpful! 

Was tricky transitioning over to Marro, I opted for adding a small amount to existing food and slowly increasing and decreasing until fully transitioned. I had to spend some time coaxing him to try but we got there in the end and the bowl is licked clean now!
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars due to the helpful customer service and convenient subscription management, which made transitioning their cat to Marro food a success.

reviews.title: If customer service were a cat
reviews.review_text:
If customer service were a cat, Marro would be a majestic Maine Coon sitting on a velvet throne, purring wisdom and kindness into your soul. Yesterday, I received the most delightful phone call from Ruth (aka the Cat Whisperer of Customer Care), just checking in on how I was doing… and of course, how Pablo the Prince of Fluff was faring.

I looked at my daughter, misty-eyed and clutching the phone like a love letter, and declared: “This is what you call customer service!” Honestly, I half expected Ruth to ask if Pablo prefers classical or jazz during mealtime.

Marro, you’re not just selling cat food—you’re delivering gourmet meals with a side of heartwarming humanity. You’ve officially earned a lifelong customer (and Pablo’s smug approval, which is no small feat). Keep being pawsome!
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars due to the exceptional and personalized customer service they received from Marro, particularly from Ruth, which made them a lifelong customer.

reviews.title: Healed kitty dermatitis! Marro is an amazing company
reviews.review_text:
Moving from the US to the UK, I have been on a two-year journey trying to find the right food for my two cats. Both are picky and one has dermatitis. After a bad experience with a kibble making my cats' coats dull and exacerbating the dermatitis, I looked for a food with omega 3 and found...

Marro.

My cats were a bit wary at first of trying the new food, but I kept their old food away and after two days they were gobbling up their chicken dinners. Within a few days of eating Marro, my cat's itchy skin no longer bothered him and his skin is starting to clear up.

Marro sends their food in the cutest box that can be turned into a playhouse for your kitties. They also responsibly pack with wool insulation - a bonus if you compost!

I thought Marro couldn't get any better, but my customer service experience with Eliza was above and beyond. This is a company who truly cares about pets and their owners. We will be customers for life.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's high-quality food with omega 3 improved their cat's dermatitis and itchy skin, and they received exceptional customer service from the company.

They look fit and happy. I feel I am getting what I pay for. They are the best and deserve the best. 100%protein. No kibble for my cats!
The customer service is brilliant too which is important to me. Thank you for the gifts found in the boxes. Especially the shopper. Superb quality and very useful.
I shall continue to use this food.

reviews.title: A Purrfect Dining Experience
reviews.review_text:
A Purrfect Dining Experience – Five Paws Up! :feet:

As a discerning feline with impeccable taste, I must say—Marro truly understands the fine art of feline cuisine. From the moment my human opened the package, I knew something special was about to happen. The aroma? Simply divine. The texture? Exquisite. Every bite was a symphony of flavors, leaving me satisfied yet always eager for more.

Not only does Marro satisfy my sophisticated palate, but it also keeps my human happy—no fuss, no mess, just top-quality meals delivered with care. And let’s be honest, a well-fed cat is a happy cat (which means a happy human too).

Marro, you have my heart (and my best model poses) forever. Keep up the pawsome work!

With whisker-twitching delight,
Luna, the Felifashion Star :star2:

reviews.title: Meow-velous company
reviews.review_text:
My two cats have always been very fussy eaters; deciding they don’t like food that they loved a day or two previously. I’ve tried them with prepared meals in jelly, or gravy, with fish or meats, and an assortment of biscuits. They have always been fussy. Until Marro. 
My boys love this food. There was a tip to serve it warm to release the nice smells so we soak it in a jug of warm water for a minute or two just to warm it up without making it too hot for their mouths. I used to throw away food regularly that hadn’t been touched. But now I regularly come into the kitchen to find bowls licked clean. 

The company have been very helpful when I needed to update one cats weight and change payment details from our trial to our actual subscription. Customer service was excellent. 

And the food is delivered on a specific day frozen and well packaged to maintain freshness. 
I have a few friends with cats and I have told them all about Marro. 
Whole heartedly recommend.

reviews.title: I have tried most brands of wet food…
reviews.review_text:
I have tried most brands of wet food for my cat. Most of them caused him to be sick due to the questionable ingredients. 

I ordered a trial box of Morro in the hope that he liked it and kept it down! 
Success - yes he liked the Chicken & Turkey, but not so keen on Beef. His stomach was so much better .., no sickness!

I know cats are fussy, but it’s worth trying if your cat has a delicate tummy, 
I have ordered a few different flavours for his second order, so I hope he likes them too. 

I stored a few days worth of sachets in the fridge (they keep fresh for 7 days in the fridge) and the rest in the freezer. 

You just have to remember to get more out to defrost when it’s needed. 

All in all Alfie is enjoying his quality food and I’m happy he’s happy. 

It’s worth a go!
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's high-quality food, with its suitable ingredients, helped their fussy cat with a delicate tummy to stop being sick and enjoy mealtime.

reviews.review_text:
Our two love Marro food, I recommend the plan to anyone who has cats. 

I have one extremely sensitive cat that has never been able to stomach wet food, and only very specific dry food and she handles this no problem - another plus, neither of their poos stink! 

To add the cherry on top the customer service is second to none. 
I’ve recently changed their plan, and unfortunately the website doesn’t have the capabilities to modify pet weights yet, therefore I was unsure whether the amount of food per day needed to change. 
It was no problem, a quick email and the team found me the best deal and got it sorted straight away. 
Thank you very much all of you!

reviews.title: Amazing

reviews.title: Thea the work kitty
reviews.review_text:
Thea was our work kitty for several years after being abandoned by her owner. We think she’s about 13 years old and in the last few months at work, she started to lose weight and started to look old.

I decided to bring her into a home environment and trialed various foods, some causing her to be sick and others too chunky for her to enjoy. We went to a cat show and spoke to some people from Marro, we decided to have a trial of their food to see if it will work for her. She loves it!

We only give chicken and turkey as they seem her favourites and now she’s not as hungry as she once was so I feel it fills her up more than more food from other brands.

I had one complaint that a few of our pouches were overfilled so ended up leaking, I spoke to Marro and within an hour they were offering me replacements and a 10% discount off my next box.

We started the food mid November and now in mid March she is still loving it. She also looks much healthier and looks like a young cat again
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's food improved their 13-year-old cat's health and appearance, and the company provided excellent customer service when an issue arose.

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.title: Marro saved my cat's life
reviews.review_text:
My cat is getting on in years and has been struggling with some stomach issues for some time. I've tried all kinds of things, different foods, treatments, etc and nothing worked. I happened to spot a Marro booth in town a few days ago and got chatting to a lovely gentleman who told me all about the company and what they do. I decided that it was worth giving them a go and I could not be more thrilled with the results. In just one day, my cat's health seems to have massively improved! He's got more energy, he's eating better, his dropping are healthier and he just seems so much happier! I'll admit, he was a little bit apprehensive about trying new food at first but before long he'd eaten his first portion and was begging me for another!

Marro are shockingly affordable, especially given the quality of their product. The box doubles up as a little house for your cat, the insulation is wool so you can use it to make a little cushion for your cat, and the quality of the food is unbelievable!

Marro has quite literally saved my cat's life.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's high-quality food greatly improved their elderly cat's health and digestion issues in just one day, transforming their cat's life.

reviews.title: HAPPY CAT. HAPPY CUSTOMER :star::star::star::star::star:
reviews.review_text:
Took the plunge and tried Marro and 100% pleased that I did 
I’ve always gone for what I considered a good quality cat food but this is above the rest 
Little bit of encouragement to start, followed the plan for introducing a new food that came with the trial box 
1st feed- Still gave her regular food with teaspoon of Marro on a side dish 
she did sniff and walk away and ate the regular food then returned and ate the Marro. 
2nd feed did the same. 
She ate the regular food then ate the Marro 
3rd feed did the same 
Next day just introduced Marro feed only 
she cleared the dish and same for the following feeds
5 days on Vienna clears every feed and licks the dish and has also started purring whilst eating, this is new and she has never done this before 
An issue i’ve had in the past and this is with good quality cat food Vienna will sometimes  vomit a meal back 
:crossed_fingers: :crossed_fingers::crossed_fingers: not had one episode of a meal coming up since Vienna has been on Marro
Early days and we’ve taken it slowly and she’s happy, so pleased I brought the next box forward earlier 
So, a pleased customer and a pleased Vienna :smile_cat::joy_cat: and soo pleased I gave this a chance 
I will update again as I go along
categories: Took a While But Now Love It

reviews.title: Lovely quality of meals and my cat is…

Delivery was on time and the pouches are tucked up in my freezer for the 6 week period. It’s good I can store a few in the fridge as I only have a small freezer! Thanks everyone from r your kind customer service too .

reviews.title: Marro is excellent
reviews.review_text:
I initially gave this 4 stars but I realised the negatives are my cats issues rather than the food. She has eaten more of this food than any other food in her 19 years. She still turns her nose up every now then so we go back to old cat food for 24 hrs and she comes back to Marro. There is barely any waste with this food. A mouth at most where with other brand I’m throwing more than half away each meal. There is no nasty smell to the food or her poos which is excellent. Generally it seems better for her gut but she has been constipated twice on this and never before. Probably because it’s pure meat rather than loads of fillers and food a cat shouldn’t have but she did struggle quite a bit on one of the occasions so we prevent that now. It has saved me money in the long run and certainly saves waste so it’s not expensive as I initially thought. The sample box is excellent value so I’d urge anyone with a fussy cat to give it a try. Chicken and beef are a clear winner here. 
Some negative reviews said about storage, it really isn’t an issue if you have a freezer and I just take 2 out at a time and they defrost in a compartment in the fridge. My old lady prefers it warmed a bit which is fine by me but she has eaten it happily straight out of the fridge too.
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their 19-year-old fussy cat thrives on Marro's high-quality, pure meat food with minimal waste and no nasty smell, despite some initial constipation issues.

Purrs and nose bumps to the Marro team who are extremely helpful and friendly to talk to. 10 out of 10. :smile_cat::heart_eyes_cat:

Stores really easily, I just pull out a few days worth - Chewie has 2 pouches a day - and leave the rest in the freezer. A few seconds warming in the microwave makes it an even tastier treat.

Highly recommended by both Chewie and I!

reviews.title: Mikey aged 16
reviews.review_text:
My parents recieved  a box via my Dads company. For whatever reason the original people didn’t accept delivery and it would go off at the delivery depot. So when someone asked if anyone had a cat my Dad spoke up and he brought the box home. 
They gave me  ( I’m very, very fussy) my first pouch, I LOVED it. Ate the lot. Usually i leave some of the other foods in my bowl but this time I licked it clean, so yummy .  They thought they’d see how I got on with the other meals And my goodness I meowed to tell them I still loved it and would have had more sachets than I should if they had let me, they didn’t :crying_cat_face:.  So here we are now, awaiting our second discounted order and i’m still loving it. No more wasted food like before. And for my Mummy knowing it’s nutritious and good for me is a bonus and at 16 I remain in good health ( few joint pains here and there) I can’t complain. This time Mummy has bought me other flavours to try and I can’t wait. More cuddle time for Mummy and Daddy.

reviews.title: I'm a bit of a nerd when it comes to pet food!

I did a lot of research for my new cat, Raven Dinks and found that Marro had high quality ingredients for a lower price point than other similar brands. Raven enjoys her meal times, although strangely doesn't like the fish one. Beef is her favourite! The only sad point is that now she is no longer a kitten her portions have halved (due to her being older and spayed) and I think Raven will not be happy! :rolling_on_the_floor_laughing: Her coat is also very glossy!
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's high-quality ingredients and nutritious food have made a positive impact on their cat's health, as evident from her glossy coat and enjoyment of meal times.

You have gained lifelong customers, Marro! Thank-you so much for producing high-quality, healthy food for all of our fur-babies to enjoy! 5:star2:

reviews.title: Amazing for our diabetic cat
reviews.review_text:
This food has been life changing for our lovely boy Mr Bo Jangles. When he came to us he was obese and an undiagnosed diabetic. We tried for nine months to regulate his blood sugars with twice daily injections of insulin. Even that didn't work. Do, we decided to change his diet completely and chose Marro, due to the very high protein content and lack of additives.  Bo hasn't looked back. His blood sugars have gone from 23 (with insulin) to 4.5. The vet has twice lowered his insulin in 2 months. 
Not only has the food had a dramatic effect on his blood sugar, Bo also loves his fresh pouches. 
On a monthly basis it is cheaper than all the diabetic wet pouches, which Bo did not like.
Thank you Marro!
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's high-protein, additive-free food dramatically improved their cat's health, regulating blood sugar levels and reducing insulin needs.

reviews.title: I had tried other subscription cat…
reviews.review_text:
I had tried other subscription cat foods before but failed to find one that my cat liked enough to finish one week. Marro came up on Instagram so I took up their introductory offer. It was the gravy that swayed me, my cat loves some gravy! 

My cat, Itchy, an old man cat, has finished his first week, second week underway. I warm the pouch much like warming a baby’s bottle, in a bowl of warm water to avoid microwave hot spots. The results so far are very encouraging. Itchy is enjoying Marro. The main difference I can see is that the food has chewable lumps of meat, the smooth, very dry fresh foods possibly didn’t give Itchy the chewing action he enjoys, as a cat and the gravy isn’t like pouch food gravy. It has the same look and consistency as a good gravy made with meat juices. This is the first time I have warmed Itchy’s food too so I have assumed that also has made it more attractive to him. Body temperature food is closer to what a cat would eat naturally, if catching his own food. 

We are still getting used to the new routine which may involve some adjustments but changes are easy to make via the Marro website. The boxes are very nice too! 
I would recommend Marro, especially if you have tried other fresh cooked subscription foods, and your cat wasn’t very happy. At least try their introductory offer when it’s on. I feel much better knowing that Itchy is eating much better quality food. It is only a bit more expensive than cheap pouch food but that’s because it has real meat in it. Think, cheap chicken nuggets versus fresh cooked chicken breast. The best thing is that my old man is eating good food now.
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's high-quality food with real meat and gravy has successfully satisfied their fussy old cat, Itchy, who had previously been unhappy with other subscription cat foods.

They used to turn their noses up at everything after a few days. 
You should see how fat the foxes are that used to come up my garden every night for their leftovers.
There are no leftovers now, (I do have to buy the foxes dog biscuits though).
Customer service is great, I bodged my first order up and just got chicken delivered, (my fault entirely), not a problem, super helpful Daniel sent me through tasters of the other flavours.
He’s also just amended my 3rd order, increasing the size, as it works out cheaper.
When you compare the rubbish that the main food suppliers sell you to Marro, it’s really not a difficult decision to switch over. 
A small company that’s doing it right.
Marro..Tigger, Milo, Cosmo and Willow salute you! Thank you

reviews.title: Simply The Best
reviews.review_text: My cat has had a chronic stomach problem for several years, now she doesn't !!!!! Despite trying vet recomended foods, daily mediactionand constant vetinary interventions nothing helped. I saw this company at the Good Food show, now months later I have a happy, healthy cat. It took a while for her problems to settle down completely, to be expected considering she has had serious digestive issues since 2020. The change in her is incredible, no more digestive issues, she loves the food and needs no medication. The company are incredible, I can bring orders forward if I start to run low, I can change the amount I order with a simple phone call to someone who actually picks up the phone! I cannot speak highly enough of this company  and would have no hesitation in recomending them. I find I use more food than their recomendation, but I also have no waste, she loves it.

reviews.title: Marro, Masters of fresh cat food
reviews.review_text:
Amazing, easy and helpful company. I absolutely love marro. After a ton of research I really try to feed my cat only the best quality foods however there’s a limited supply in pets at home(Blink, Naturesmenu, Seriously good bistro) and it’s very expensive after buying a few boxes for the month(£50 ish). I started to branch out into online subscription however my cat wasn’t a fan of katkin or fuzzball. After seeing their stall at a Christmas market and signing up for a trial box which was so cheap I started my cat on the food. My cat didn’t take to it straight away however after adding a topper and putting the food on a lick mat she dove straight in. She loves all the recipes with their strong fresh smell aha as well as the cutest boxes EVER. I’ve never seen her lay down or sit in a bed/box or anything but she loves this one. The ease of the meals being frozen and then being safe in the fridge for 7 days is so easy unlike my first thoughts which was it would be harder than the traditional tins. Over all I’ve been on this food for 3 months and I’m happy to say it’s going well.
Bonus: you get freebies along with your subscription such as a spork and a tote bag. THANK YOU marro.
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because they are extremely satisfied with Marro's high-quality food, convenient subscription service, and additional perks like freebies, which have made a positive impact on their cat's diet and their own shopping experience.

It smells good right out the pouch and he hardly leaves any, which was not the case with his previous more commercial brands. Regretting giving him that rubbish all these years to be honest. Marro costs a little more but he’s eating it all so no waste, it’s probably more cost effective actually and seeing him healthier is worth any extra anyway. reviews.title: Genuinely the best cat food out there…
reviews.review_text:
Genuinely the best cat food out there and a wonderful company too

We inherited a very old cat with lots of health problems a couple of years ago. She was neglected and had lots of dental work but was still always unsure about eating anything really. We tried her on every food out there and I had to do all the research and buy everything to try and make her food myself because I didn't feel like I had a choice. In desperation I purchased off a Facebook ad (which I would never usually do), the first box arrived and it was beautifully presented. You can tell thought went into every bit and they really understand cats. My little one ate all the food (although wasn't a massive fan of the fish so I logged into my account and just took that flavour off). She went from not wanting to eat to attempting to run over every time I go to put food down for her. Her health and coat especially has improved so much and she's much more agile despite her arthiritis. She loves it so much I can even successfully mix in medications without her declining it. 

Its also been great for me too as I have food aversions due to autism and cat food has always been difficult for me to handle. I put Marro in the microwave for 10 seconds and it smells so good I've actually been tempted to try it myself. 

Its worth every penny and the company is wonderful too.

reviews.title: Happy tummy's, happy cats..
reviews.review_text:
I wanted to try a fresh food as my female cat was struggling with dried food - it was upsetting her tummy - and I hoped a fresh food would be gentler on her and having seen the adverts a number of times I thought I would give it a try.  

We are now 4 weeks into the new food and both my cats have taken to it wonderfully.   They look forward to meal times and my girls tummy is much better.   I can honestly say they are happier and I'm glad we made the switch.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because their cat's digestive issues improved significantly after switching to Marro's fresh food, making them happier and healthier.

reviews.title: A great company to deal.
reviews.review_text:
A great company to deal with always so helpful, either with questions on their menus to the size and quantity of food for your cat. I have tried various other fresh cat food companies in the past; at first there was the hesitation because it was new, then okay I might as well try it and then with some foods  the refusal to eat it, so lots of wasted food!!  From the off Harley loved Marro and looks forward to his meals!!  I hope he continues to enjoy Marro’s range of foods they really do smell good and they are so 
convenient and easy to store.
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's helpful customer service and high-quality food won over their previously hesitant cat, who now looks forward to meals.

The pouches of food are also easy to open and not messy. Really happy overall and have recommended Marro to several friends/family members

My almost 18 year old cat loves this cat food, from a kitten she been picky with her food and has sometimes been sick after eating. She hasn’t been sick at all since being on Marro fresh cat food. 

As a company Marro are understanding, offer good advice and support and were very compassionate when I had sadly had my cat out to sleep last December

Highly recommend food and company

Not sure if it’s a coincidence, but she’s been purring more as well.

Very reliable company. 
The food arrives in cute boxes that my cats love to sleep in it or play with it. 
I highly recommend this company . :heart_eyes_cat:

reviews.title: Marro food for cats
reviews.review_text: My cat is very fussy, she absolutely loves the food I have now managed to get her off biscuits to a meat only diet, so much better for cats 10/10. The little box it arrives in is super cute and doubles up as a little Marro mansion :heart_eyes_cat: even a free fork/spoon and a little toy cannot say how very impressive the overall experience has been.
reviews.summary: The reviewer's fussy cat loves Marro's meat-only diet, and the overall experience, including cute packaging and extras, has been very impressive, earning a 5-star review.

reviews.title: My Siamese cat is very very picky and…
reviews.review_text: My Siamese cat is very very picky and has a super sensitive stomache . Usually gets bored with this kind of food and I have to try something new. So far he’s enthusiastically eaten everything and meows loudly when he thinks it’s time for more. I’m on my second box of sachets and already brought forward my third! That’s very telling. Fingers crossed this lasts .
reviews.summary: The reviewer's extremely picky Siamese cat with a sensitive stomach loves Marro's food, enthusiastically eating every meal and showing excitement for more.

reviews.title: Great food = optimum health
reviews.review_text: Marro cat food is excellent quality and our little girl loves it. She will start weaving and crying the minute she hears the microwave working. I always warm her sachet for a minute before serving. Marro provide a brilliant selection of flavours to suit the pickiest of palettes. The portion size is just right however the staff are only a phone call away and extremely helpful with any concern or request. A full list of ingredients is provided with the delivery. Communication is excellent so you are prepared and ready for your delivery. I can highly recommend
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro cat food is of excellent quality, has a great selection of flavors, and the company provides helpful customer service and clear communication.

reviews.title: Highly recommend!
reviews.review_text: So I have an 18 month old female who started gaining some weight after being spayed - she's never been a fussy eater at all, but after some research into the high carbs in normal cat food, I wanted to find something high protein for her! She is OBSESSED with Marro! Literally screams when she sees me opening the packet! Not to mention she's got 2 toys from them in the boxes, she's obsessed with Maude the Mouse, it's her favourite toy and keeps her so active! She's slowly losing weight due to both the food and her new fave toy, and the personalised touch, like Marro actually cares, and it means so much! So glad I found them!
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because their cat is obsessed with Marro's high protein food and has started losing weight, with the added bonus of a favourite toy that keeps her active.

reviews.title: Fussy Cat

reviews.title: Wonderful new discovery
reviews.review_text:
We are now on our second box, my older cat Toby has become a fussy eater and constantly asking for food - we did a couple of small servings to check he liked then on day two he had a whole portion for breakfast then proceeded to sleep for the morning, even then didn’t ask for more until tea time (he does have biscuits available) so far he’s really enjoying his new menus 
I had a little difficulty at the begging with logging in (my fault) I messaged in and it was sorted quickly 
So far i would really recommend 
Toby is a little fickle so I can see him goung off it for a while but as they are frozen that’s not a problem - definitely worth a try

She wakes me up in a morning for food and sits in anticipation whilst I’m warming it up. Got to admit that her coat is lovely and shiny now, plus her poos are not a smelly or runny. She eats less during the day; she is just happier eating Marro.  Top notch cat nosh!

We have, had to split the meals into 4 as that is when he expected meal times due to having 2 breakfasts (he is a bigger cat with Maine Coon running in his family.) He has just jumped in his Marro house but unable to get through the door, which has all added to the experience. You really do think of everything cats, for some this could be a new safe space. Well done and all appreciated.

reviews.review_text: After trying lots of different cat food. We have finally found one they love. Customer service is second to none. Would highly recommend to all feline owners.

reviews.title: A Purrfect Cat Food Company!!
reviews.review_text:
We signed our cat (Simon) up to Marro because we wanted a premium cat food for him as although he is healthy,  and not particularly food fussy, he is FIV + and we want to give him every chance to stay healthy, fit, indoor active and regularly interrupt our online work meetings! 

He loves food. We think having been a street cat before we got to adopt him, he will always have an issue with where his next meal is coming from! We would love to leave kibble in his bowl all day, but he would eat all day! So following our vet's advice, he is limited to two meals a day! He used to start begging (crying, howling) for dinner well before dinner time! Since  changing him to Marro he is satisfied for longer, and that's brilliant for us all!

The service has been excellent, and Tash and the Marro team have been fantastic in terms of customer service. Can't say enough positive things about the food and the service. Thank you all at Marro.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because Marro's premium cat food and excellent customer service have satisfied their FIV+ cat's hunger for longer, improving his overall health and well-being.

reviews.title: Miss Molly approved!
reviews.review_text: After trying a different "fresh but delivered frozen" brand I was a bit disappointed with the look and packaging of that product although Miss Molly liked it. After giving it a try for a month I was getting frustrated and saw an ad for Marro. Ordered a trial Marro box and we are both wowed! The box is a house for your kitty so great start. The food looks and smells delicious! You know what is inside every recipe and the meals are packaged really well. No split leaking plastic like the first brand. I particularly like that the two meals are packaged in separate sections of each days pack of food. It arrives fresh and you can freeze it. When it's defrosted I can't see any difference in quality or smell from when it was fresh. It's just a pleasure to feed my cat this. I love supporting a small business if I can and I honestly think this is great value if you're looking for a high protein low carb food. Since switching to Marro I've not had to throw away any leftovers because there aren't any. Miss Molly has just been diagnosed with diabetes so needs to eat at 12 hour intervals. She likes this food so much that the worry of her not eating has been taken away. Miss Molly approved and highly recommended by her staff! Thank you to Maeve and all the Marro team - we're hooked!
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because they were impressed with the quality and packaging of Marro's food, and it has made a significant positive impact on their cat's health and eating habits, particularly with managing diabetes.

Takes up very little space in the freezer and we keep 7 days worth in the fridge. It's so convenient. Highly recommend

reviews.title: A really great experience in every…
reviews.review_text:
A really great experience in every way!!

Ordered the trial box for my 1 cat and got 7 days worth of food - all a variety of flavours (chicken, pork, turkey and beef) with the free gift of a spork, menu and a booklet with lots of information about changing food and just general info about the brand and food.

The packaging is exceptional - it feels like everything is done intentionally. Ice packs to keep the food frozen in transit, lined with sheep’s wool (which you can reuse as compost or cushions!!) and the box itself can be recycled as a fun toy for your cat to jump in and climb through.

Food itself is great - you can tell its quality ingredients and actually smells like the flavour it says it is (no more manky smelling cat pouches). As someone whose cat never really touched the actual food of the wet food and just licked the jelly she went at Marro like crazy!! She ate a whole portion straight away and is now always meowing whenever she sees me sorting out her food and is frantically dashing around my feet when I lay it down - she’s obsessed.

Customer service are also amazing, very helpful as I had a few questions just double checking how much to feed her. They were quick to respond and even sent a free gift as a thank you for my lovely email:face_holding_back_tears:

Just received her whole months worth of food (it’s a week after you order the trial box) and Cecilia was straight away in the box. It also came with another free toy so thank you :)

Overall just a great experience, couldn’t recommend this brand enough:heart:
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars due to the exceptional quality of Marro's cat food, outstanding customer service, and the overall great experience they had with the brand.

reviews.title: Company go above and beyond!
reviews.review_text:
Marro box arrived today on schedule! The packaging was hilarious and our Nacho has taken to sitting inside the box it was delivered in. Really enjoyed the nice touch of the pop out door and window!
The content of the cat food was mostly all frozen (I was impressed) and the food came wrapped around in sustainable packaging. The food packages fit very easily into the freezer and all labelled so that we know what exactly we got. We really enjoy the design of Marro, especially the red spork and menu that arrived in the box! Now we can treat our beans like the royalty they are! The best part of the package for me was that now I know why the company is called “Marro” and this made me laugh out loud as I had no idea! It’s a cat’s meow by the way - MArrroo! Brilliant service from the team so far and I’m really looking forward to seeing how their website is developed further (although this might have been done since I last checked last month!) 
We haven’t yet given our Nacho & Pepper any meals yet but we are really excited for it to defrost and let our cats enjoy! However, even if they don’t enjoy the food (which I very much doubt will be the case) - Marro looks like a very good company and my experience with them so far had been exemplary! 100% recommend to all other cat parents to try!

reviews.title: The BEST cat food company EVER! :sparkles:
reviews.review_text:
Oh my goodness where do we start? This is going to be the longest review we’ve probably EVER written but very deserving! 

We have two kitties, Sugar aged 17 and Poppy ages 13. Poppy is an absolute pickle and soooo fussy when it comes to food. She also has a bit of a sensitive tum so we’ve been on a mission for a long time to find a high quality food that they will both actually eat and enjoy, that is good for them and doesn’t upset Poppy’s delicate tum. You name it we’ve tried it, so many different cat foods including Katkin and untamed. Both our cats have either not really liked it so we’ve wasted food (and money) or it’s just not agreed with them. 

We reluctantly decided to give Marro a try, expecting the same result as we had from other cat food providers. But much to our surprise right from the start even Poppy our super fussy cat tucked right in, she literally licked the bowl clean! It was so wonderful to see. A bit of advice for anyone starting their cat on this is to lightly warm the food up, we’ve continued to do this and they absolutely love it. This food even smells good! 

Both our girls love their meal times and it’s clean bowls each time. Poppy’s upset tum is no more so, that means no more super stinky and runny poops. Their fur looks so much more healthy looking and shiny too. They are happier, healthier kitties for sure! 

On top of all that Marro’s customer service is just incredible. We had been in a serious car accident a couple of weeks ago and as a newish customer had been in contact via email with them to change pouch sizes. When they found out about the accident they went totally above and beyond and in particular the lovely Eliza from their team. We were totally overwhelmed when they gave us a lovely gift too to help out at a tough time.

Thank you for being so super amazing Marro! If only all companies matched their dedication to providing an amazing product and incredible customer service too. They clearly love cats and it’s wonderful to see they have a genuine care for them and their owners. Thank you :pray::skin-tone-2::sparkles::smiling_face_with_3_hearts:
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's high-quality cat food resolved their fussy cat's sensitive stomach issues and the company provided exceptional customer service, going above and beyond to support them during a difficult time.

reviews.review_text: I recently purchased this from a Christmas fair. At first I was impressed but then when I got home there were a few particulars that weren’t mentioned such as the food needs to be refrigerated and if not used within seven days then it needs to be frozen. Not much good if like me, you have a small fridge and a small freezer. I’m giving this five because of contact from customer service reached out to me offered me a refund which I refused because after all they did give me the goods so it seems unfair to take something that I’ve already paid for the lady that phoned me was absolutely amazing. Please give this a go so far. I’m not having much luck with the transition even just mix in a spoonful in with their food I’m not sure if it’s the taste or the smell however they love the gravy Would recommend giving it a try.
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars due to the excellent customer service they received, particularly from a helpful lady who offered a refund and provided support despite some initial issues with the product.

reviews.title: Good experience & food

reviews.title: For its customer service alone makes it…
reviews.review_text: For its customer service alone makes it worth using this company.  They are brilliant.  Unfortunately, after initial roaring success, our Bobacat won't eat it.  However, we will try again using the tips from the lovely Marro staff!

reviews.title: Stinky poops no more
reviews.review_text: Stinky poops no more! My two cats bathroom breaks were FOUL on a few different well known brands. This is a big pricier but so worth it. My older cat has started to become more playful too and my younger cat no longer seems hungry all the time! They also love the free toys

reviews.title: A tasty solution to diabetic food
reviews.review_text: After our senior cat was diagnosed as diabetic we have struggled to find a brand of cat food that he actually liked and that is good for him. After several months we came across Marro, and though it is not marketed  specifically as diabetic food, the high protein content, lack of additives and high quality of the food makes it perfect - and our cat absolutely loves it. Given the restrictions to his diet and amount of food it is so important for us that he enjoys he food - and he does! He now looks forward to all his meals.  Thank you Marro!
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because Marro's high-quality cat food with high protein content and no additives has made a significant positive impact on their diabetic senior cat's health and mealtime enjoyment.

reviews.review_text: What can I say? Maggie is discerning when it comes to, well, almost everything! She enjoys her Marro food. She never wastes any. She delights in the various flavours. She is bright eyed and has a thick, glossy coat.

reviews.title: A food he likes, at last!
reviews.review_text:
I have a fussy 18 year old boy, who started turning his nose up at every wet food i gave him. I’d already gone down the chilled/frozen route, but it was a “no thanks”. 

I saw an ad for marro, checked the reviews and decided to give it a try without realising that it needed to go in the freezer. However, Todd enjoyed the food so much, I decided that it was worth clearing out a space for. 

We are now waiting for our third delivery.
reviews.summary: The reviewer's 18-year-old fussy cat, who had rejected other wet foods, loved Marro's food, making it worth the extra effort of freezer storage and leading to repeat deliveries.

reviews.title: So impressed every step of the way
reviews.review_text: My two cats have loved every flavour and the beautiful packaging of course! Decided to give Marro a go over the other fresh cat food subscriptions out there as they seemed very genuine and transparent, and focused on the cats before the humans (they know the best way to get to us!). I had some questions and Tasha from customer service was so helpful and really took the time to look into my account to answer my many questions accurately. Not everything is available to edit online yet as they are new so please be patient. Their team is incredible and very friendly so it shouldn’t be a problem. We look forwards to seeing this company flourish!
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars due to the excellent customer service they received from Marro, particularly from Tasha, and their cats' love for the high-quality food and various flavors offered.

reviews.title: Transformational
reviews.review_text:
I really didn’t think my cats would take to this as they are very fussy, and after two days of stand-offs they’ve seen the light.
I’ve seen a big reduction in how much they want to eat as they are satisfied much quicker, their fur is thick and glossy, and the difference int he litter tray is apparent (IFKYK :rolling_on_the_floor_laughing:).
Will stay on this food plan now

reviews.title: Wonderful experience
reviews.review_text:
Really great experience & service! Ordered a sample box for my very very picky girls and they loved it, especially the chicken & turkey!! My girls have been through so many foods so relieved to have finally got it right!
I had to email them to change my box to include more chicken and the reply back was so fast. Excellent service from Eliza. No trouble to change it for us. Felt like I was talking to a friend! Genuinely interested in my girls and how the food was going! 
I would recommend anyone with cats to try them out! Your cats will be so grateful!’ The food is high quality!
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars due to the high-quality food that their picky cats loved, and the excellent customer service they received from Eliza when making changes to their order.

reviews.title: Strong recommend
reviews.review_text: First of all the customer service is great. Then the food. Quality is great. My cat is very fussy and generally likes different things depending on the weather and I mean it when I say I’ve tried every brand, from high street to online including cool cat and untamed. Marro is the first food I have bought that he will eat every day. It’s also the only food he finishes and doesn’t turn his nose up at. I like how it’s in individual portions and I’ve found 30 seconds in a cup of hot water takes the chill off and melts the gravy (his favourite part) as other members of the family do not approve of cat food in the microwave! A strong recommend from me.
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's high-quality food won over their extremely fussy cat, who now eats it every day and finishes each portion.

reviews.title: Another 5 stars for customer service!
reviews.review_text: I already left a 5 star review for Marro based on our sign up and first box experience, but I have had a lot of support recently from the customer service team (shout out to Tasha, Eliza and Georgia!) so wanted to leave another review. I've been so impressed with the help I've had about the best way to add our new kitten to our Marro account, and finding the right type of meals and portion sizes. They put so much effort into working out the best option for us all, and the communication was really wonderful. Marro's customer service really is the cat's pyjamas!

reviews.title: Best food we have found to date
reviews.review_text:
For the last 3 years (since we got our 1st Savannah) we have struggled to find food that they will eat or won’t turn litter time into a Hazmat area.. 

I now have 4 Savannah’s - all 3.5kg or heavier and all 4 clean their bowls when it comes to Marro.

Toilet time is now solid and stench free for all 4 cats (which is a historic first) and we have no complaints from them at meal time (they are not fans of the fish flavour, but no issues otherwise). 
All cats have lost the lacklustre they have had over the last year or so and have a newly found energy (we have young cats acting like kittens again).

When emailing Customer Service to enquire about pouch sizes, they were very quick and very helpful to fulfil our needs.

I currently have 4 happy Savannah’s and 2 happy humans… I am hopeful that this will be a long and happy relationship with Marro for years to come.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because Marro's food transformed their cats' health, energy, and digestion, and they also received excellent customer service.

reviews.title: Marro is a great service
reviews.review_text: Marro is a great service. Does help that our cat loves it as well and we don’t have to worry about when the food runs out because it’s just delivered to our doorstep. The box is well insulated and the food arrives cold, I probably would suggest letting the pouch you’re gonna feed warm up before serving because it was quite stiff and cold, or just warm it up, that’s what we did.

reviews.title: Two very happy elderly cats!
reviews.review_text: I have two elderly, very fussy cats.  I've tried nearly every make of cat food out there, including raw, and some they liked, but usually not for very long. They are also more content and not continually crying for food, only to walk away from a full bowl after one sniff!  I love that the plastic and fleece to keep the food cold is recyclable and the box with cut-outs is cute for younger cats.  The free gift is a bonus too.  I hope my two continue to enjoy it as you can tell that the ingredients are far better quality than most supermarket or Pets at Home brands.

reviews.title: Very happy kitty
reviews.review_text:
We have moved over from purrform with no problems doing a straight swap from one to the other. Her poos are still the same etc…
My kitten was just not finishing anything from purrform and I wasn't sure if I was giving her too much or she just wasn’t very keen on it.
With Marro, the pre portioned packs are peace of mind that she’s getting the right amount.
Each pouch is freshly opened at each meal time (no scooping out of a tub over the course of a week) and she finishes the lot and seems to be completely satisfied until her next meal is due. 
We had a slight hiccup after the trial box as I had chose not to include the fish as it was the only flavour that had been untouched my cat, however a quick email and it was all straightened out no problem by a nice lady from Customer Service (sorry, I can’t remember her name!).
Delivery has been perfect, and it’s all packed really great and is still frozen by the time I get to it. 
All is going well so far and we’re enjoying being part of Marro :grinning:
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because they were impressed with the quality of Marro's pre-portioned packs, the freshness of the food, and the helpful customer service that resolved a minor issue with their order.

reviews.title: No honking smelly food EVER again!!!
reviews.review_text: The customer service, the quality of the food, the ease of ordering and the prompt delivery make Marro the best choice for my cats, Bee and Fly. It’s an easy choice because Marro are bloody marvellous! Go and try it amd I bet you your cats will love you forever!
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars due to Marro's exceptional customer service, high-quality food, and convenient ordering and delivery process.

reviews.title: My cat absolutely looooves Marro!
reviews.review_text:
Firstly the most important thing to say is that my cat is absolutely in love with Marro - he comes home at the same time each day and sits by the fridge waiting for us to get his food out, and meows constantly whilst we’re getting it out the packet! I’ve never seen him so excited for his food before. 
The range of food is great, so my cat doesn’t get bored with the same old thing, and also the packaging that it’s received in is very cute. You can tell that there’s a lot of thought that goes into the design and the overall experience, from the Marro spork to the box that can be turned into a cat house to the recyclable packaging that can be used for composting too. Deliveries are always on time and the food and ice packs are still frozen, and the one time I’ve contacted customer service for advice on how much to feed my cat they were so so helpful and followed up afterwards to check that everything was okay. Overall, a company that you can tell really cares about the pets, and is made by cat people :)
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their cat is absolutely in love with Marro's food and they appreciate the company's attention to detail, helpful customer service, and eco-friendly packaging.

reviews.title: I have has sphynx cats for several…
reviews.review_text:
I have has sphynx cats for several years when I lost my last cat I thought I wouldn't have another but several weeks ago we got another kitten her poo was loose and no matter what we gave willow it wasn't getting any better .now I know sphynx have very complex tummy troubles and getting it right can be quiet hard so after checking butternut box as I have two Chinese crested dogs who adore butternut I came across there cat food ,(marro) so as a last attempt I ordered a trial box 
 Omg what a change within two days she was a completely different kitten poo was how it should be and leaping around and terrorising the dogs . Thankyou so much for producing another great variety of pet food I know each pet is different but carnt recommend this product highly enough even the fish variety which a number of people say their cats don't eat 
 But willow enjoys everything she has has and loves the toys especially the mouse which my dogs try to steal from her . A big well done and thankyou
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's cat food significantly improved their sphynx kitten's digestive health and overall energy within two days of switching to the product.

reviews.title: Impressed so far, no issues in contacting if needed
reviews.review_text:
Not sure what some of the negative reviews mean when they say there is no phone number to contact.... I had no issues when I contacted them (DPD driver was negligent in his delivery so let Marro know) 

The trial box came and it made a huge difference straight away.  The portions are perfectly fine if you do what you're supposed to and alternate with the wet and dry food.  Some people just don't know how to feed their pets properly I guess? 

My little beast needs a high protein diet that no off-the-shelf cat food can provide.  Trying with the supposedly 'higher end' food just upset his bowels. 

Within one day there was a stark difference and I'm now confident that the bowel trouble is far behind us.  
I am of a low income and still find this much better than what it would cost for the rubbish that's offered in our supermarkets.

I was also impressed with the clever idea of the delivery box having little pop out bits so it can be played in by the cat.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's high-protein cat food resolved their cat's bowel trouble and they were impressed with the company's customer service and convenient delivery system.

reviews.title: I have never come across such a…
reviews.review_text:
I have never come across such a fabulous customer service team.
They really put the customer first. I ordered a trial box from Marro for my two ragdoll kittens and DPD delivered to the wrong address. I raised this with Marro and they sent out another box without any hesitation. The same thing happened and so I raised this with Marro again, despite it not being their fault, and also considering they had sent another box out of courtesy, I was not expecting much of a solution. I was pleasantly proven wrong, they got in touch with DPD and sent me yet another box completely out of good will, and with no questions asked.
This is a company that values their customers, and honours the purpose of their business which is to provide felines with the best diet possible. Based on this alone, despite having not yet even received the second replacement box to trial, I can tell that they truly believe in what they do and truly strive to create the best experience possible, not only through the work that goes into creating the perfect recipes, but they also target every aspect of consumer satisfaction. This is what customer service and ethical practice is all about.
Marro has really gone above and beyond, more so than I have ever experienced with a company. They trust their customers and equally earn their trust in return.
Thank you so much to all the team involved, especially Georgia and Brendon.
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars due to Marro's exceptional customer service, which went above and beyond to resolve delivery issues and demonstrate a genuine commitment to customer satisfaction.

reviews.title: Sammi-Deane loves Marro :heart:
reviews.review_text:
Wow, what a company. 
Before I get to the food itself, this company, Tasha to be precise has gone above and beyond to help out with my cat Sammi-Deane's issues and how Marro could help. 
Thank you from both of us for following up, and saying/doing the lovely things that you have. Amazing! 
Sammi has low grade lymphoma, IBD and thyroid issues, and despite being 14 years old, continues to function with no discomfort. When his time comes we know what to do, but whilst he is happy and not suffering, we want to do the best we can for him. 
Now for the food itself, AMAZING. Sammi has always been a fussy eater, however he has been on Marro for just 3 days and has eaten EVERY last bit on each of his meals. He has not turned his nose up at any flavour to date and he has now tried them all. 
We have already ordered his next box. 
He has stomach issues with diarrhea and vomiting on occasions, and with Marro he is already having better toilet trips, his stomach is no longer gurgling, and he seems a lot more relaxed in general. The meals are filling for him and empty bowls everytime, sometimes over a couple of sittings. 
Cats can be very picky eaters, the food smells lovely and I can see why he is eating every last drop. Thanks Marro, and thanks Tasha!
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's food has not only pleased their fussy cat's palate, but also improved their cat's health issues, such as diarrhea, vomiting, and stomach discomfort, in just a few days.

reviews.title: Great for Daisy!
reviews.review_text:
I recently tried Marro cat food for my feline friend, and I have to say, it’s been quite the journey! At first, Daisy was a bit hesitant and sniffed the food before taking a few tentative bites. I was worried that I’d made the wrong choice, but to my surprise, she eventually warmed up to it.

Now, she absolutely loves it! The texture and flavors seem to have won her over, and she eagerly looks forward to mealtime. I appreciate the quality ingredients that Marro uses, which gives me peace of mind knowing I’m feeding her something nutritious.

Overall, I highly recommend Marro cat food. It may take a little time for some cats to adjust, but the results are worth it!!!

reviews.title: Great product and great service !
reviews.review_text: A longtime Butternut Box fan, great to see that there is now an option for cats too! Thank you ! Great product and great service!
