reviews.title: Seems to be a hit
reviews.review_text: We signed up last week and it seems to be a major hit so far! Loved the buying experience, and the customer service has been excellent. Hope they can keep the quality up to this standard!
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars due to their excellent buying experience and the company's great customer service, with hopes that the quality of the product will be consistently maintained.

reviews.title: Marro cat food is purr-fection
reviews.review_text: Marro cat food is purr-fection! The fresh ingredients make all the difference, and the playful, chic branding is just the cat’s meow. Premium quality, stylishly delivered—can’t recommend it enough!
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because Marro's fresh ingredients and premium quality made a significant difference for their cat.

reviews.title: Excellent and love the boxes :)
reviews.review_text: So far so good and I have a very fussy cat! Usually he would eat a little food then leave and come back but with Marro he devours it so I’m delighted.
reviews.summary: The reviewer's fussy cat devours Marro food, showing a significant improvement in appetite and satisfaction.

reviews.title: Good for my picky Siamese.
reviews.review_text: My cat is picky and wasteful with his food. He also has a sensitive stomach. He seems to be doing well on this food with an improvement in his health. And customer service is good too.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their picky cat with a sensitive stomach has shown health improvements after switching to Marro's food, with also good customer service.

reviews.title: Happy so far.
reviews.review_text: I have to say that, although only one of my cats likes Marro, this company is great.  Their response to emails is fast, efficient and the replies are courteous and caring.  The one who likes Marro smacks her lips and clears her dish now.  Yes she has her preferences (chicken/turkey/occasional beef) but then so do we.
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars due to Marro's excellent customer service and their fussy cat's love for the food, despite initial preferences.

reviews.title: My cat has a very sensitive stomach and…
reviews.review_text: My cat has a very sensitive stomach and is so fussy with food, She loves Marro and thus is shown by leaving an empty bowl. I microwave for 15 seconds and she loves it warm.
reviews.summary: The reviewer's fussy cat with a sensitive stomach loves Marro cat food, especially when warmed up, leaving an empty bowl every time.

reviews.title: Fabulous
reviews.review_text: Our cat loves this food. Delivery is reliable, food arrives frozen and in good condition. No horrible cat food smells!
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because their cat loves the food, it arrives frozen and in good condition, and the reliable delivery service is convenient.

reviews.title: Well what can I say amazing!
reviews.review_text: Well what can I say, I have two cats, one has never ever wanted to try wet food and what can I say she's eating my other cats Marro! Can't quite believe it. I love the humour of this company it's really excellent! Can we have boxes with bigger doors though my cat is on the chonky side!
reviews.summary: The reviewer's normally fussy cat, who never wanted to try wet food, loves Marro and even steals it from the other cat, earning the reviewer's 5-star review.

reviews.title: Rico adores this food
reviews.review_text:
Rico adores this food. There was a mixup with a delivery but Marro sorted it ASAP and, although it did arrive, gave me a full refund for the inconvenience.  What should have been a replacement order arrived and I was allowed to give this away. I really can't fault Marro. Rico us less keen on the fish so this is being omitted from future orders.

Thank you Marro for wonderful food for Rico and excellent Customer Service.
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars due to Marro's excellent customer service in resolving a delivery issue and their cat's love for the high-quality food.

reviews.title: Happy cat
reviews.review_text: This is clearly high quality food, firstly it smells like real food, & my picky Maine Coon loves it. The portions are small but Nala's eating less since starting on Marro. She ate several packets of wet food daily before, and wouldn't go back to that later. With Marro she tends to eat it all and will use the rest later, if she leaves any!
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their picky Maine Coon cat loves the high-quality food from Marro, which has also reduced their cat's food intake.

reviews.title: My fussy cats love it
reviews.review_text: My fussy cats love it. Very good quality food. Delivered on time. I highly recommend.
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their fussy cats love the high-quality food and it is delivered on time.

reviews.title: I got to say Marro is a big success…
reviews.review_text:
I got to say, that Marro is a big success, with my cat!:heart_eyes_cat::yum::heart_eyes_cat:She absolutely loves it, and when I ran out of it the other day, and gave her some other cat food, she just sniffed it said said: “Really?!” with her looks:laughing:
Her coat, is super soft and shiny, after she has started with Marro, and yes, her poo is less smelly too.
It is a bit expensive but worth every penny!
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because their cat loves Marro food, which has improved their coat and reduced smelly poo, making it worth the extra expense.

reviews.title: Excellent food, loved by my fussy boy
reviews.review_text:
My fussy ginger boy has wasted so much of my money by wasting numerous raw and cooked food meals in favour of his supermarket biscuits. I was quite apprehensive about trying him on yet another fancy food option but I'm so glad I did! 
He didn't even need a transition phase and ignored his biscuits going straight for the marro first time! 
He hasn't wasted a single meal so far and has even been begging for more.
Customer service have been great too, very happy with everything (and of course so is my ginger furball)
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their previously fussy cat immediately took to Marro's food and the company's customer service was also great.

reviews.title: My cats love the food and any queries I…
reviews.review_text: My cats love the food and any queries I have are dealt very efficiently by the team.
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because their cats love the food and they received efficient support from the Marro team.

reviews.title: Highly recommended
reviews.review_text: Jupiter loves his new food. Every dish is licked clean. Made from 'human grade' ingredients ensuring that he gets all of the nutrition that he needs and without any nasty fillers.
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because their cat, Jupiter, loves the food made from human-grade ingredients, ensuring he gets all the necessary nutrition without any fillers.

reviews.title: Exactly what me (& my cat) were looking for.
reviews.review_text: This food is perfect. Portion size and packaging is great. Storage is brilliant and my fussy cat absolutely loves it :heart_eyes_cat:
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their fussy cat loves the food, and they appreciate the convenient packaging and storage.

reviews.title: Thank you Marro
reviews.review_text: Thank you Marro. If you need to speak to someone they are friendly and helpful, no problem with delivery. Most importantly Jack loves the food and likes playing with the box
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because of Marro's friendly and helpful customer service and their cat, Jack, loving the food.

reviews.title: We have tried many of the new style cat…
reviews.review_text: We have tried many of the new style cat foods like Katkin etc, but I think Marro is one step ahead because the gravy you include which my very elderly cat loves. He is almost twenty, so we do add certain vitamins etc to it though. The only trouble is that ine month's supply for him can last two months. So I need to change the order frequency. He eats very small meals often rather than two big meals twice a day. Apart from that Captain Sparklepants likes it so far.
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their elderly and possibly fussy cat loves Marro's cat food, particularly the gravy, and it meets their cat's needs despite some adjustments being necessary for the subscription.

reviews.title: Good ingredients and weight control meals!
reviews.review_text: Since our baby Ragdoll cat Lay’ah experiencing Maro meals, she always enjoys them. The quality is very good with vitamins and hydration. We can freeze them to keep fresh and easy to defrost in a fridge for a day. I highly recommend if you’re looking for the high quality meals.
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because they highly recommend Marro meals due to their high quality, freshness, and beneficial ingredients like vitamins and hydration.

reviews.title: Happy Cats!
reviews.review_text:
So far all good. Cindy likes everything and Toffee would like to request you work on Fish Delish as she likes Salmon, Cod, Tuna etc but not all together!
Customer service is 'The Cats Whiskers' too!
:heart_eyes_cat::heart_eyes_cat:
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because their cats like the food, with one cat having a specific preference, and they also praised the excellent customer service.

reviews.title: Great all round experience
reviews.review_text: Fantastic meals that our elderly cat absolutely adores, and the most exceptional customer service as well. Couldn't fault them!!
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars due to the exceptional customer service and high-quality meals that their elderly cat loves.

reviews.title: Fantastic Customer Service
reviews.review_text:
We ordered the trial packs for our 10 year old rescue, who has been having issues with vomiting ever since we adopted her earlier this year. 
I was worried that a) the portion size would be too small and b) the density of the food would be too much for her tummy. 
Georgia, at customer service was very helpful, giving us various options regarding portion size, and even sent us a licky mat to encourage slower eating, but actually the cat takes her time eating the little and often that we give her and she has not vomited since we switched to Marro! 
We have also noticed that she is more content, so we are all very happy :blush:
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because Marro's food resolved their cat's vomiting issues and the company's customer service, particularly Georgia, was very helpful in addressing their concerns.

reviews.title: He likes the food but the likes the cardboard house the most
reviews.review_text:
So far my Percy likes this food a lot, he quite enjoyed the suede mouse from the trial box as well! He has only been eating Sheba before and had a fussy appetite and a grumbly tummy I often had to throw food out because he wouldn’t finish it. Initially he wasn’t keen on trying the food but after topping it with a licky treat a few times he got the taste for it and has been gobbling it up for a few days now. His tummy is settling and he leaves his plate clean.

He seems generally more content and chases me less for meals, it seems to satiate him more than the Sheba. 

I am a sucker for the fact you can pop the little doors and windows out from the delivery boxes because that’s his favourite part and saves me buying him separate cardboard houses

Hope he continues to get on with this food but so far I have had a good experience!
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their previously fussy cat with a sensitive stomach is now enjoying Marro food, finishing meals, and showing signs of improved health and contentment.

reviews.title: This is NOT a review about the food
reviews.review_text:
I want to thank Marro and their entire team. Not for the food but for the human warmth and empathy they have shown in my personal situation. About two weeks ago, I received an ad on Instagram promoting this brand so I decided to give them a chance and try the test box. I placed the order on a Saturday and unfortunately my cat who was supposed to have turned 20 on this 5th of October started having seizures out of nowhere the following Monday. I had to take her to the emergency room on Tuesday and on Wednesday unfortunately and with all the pain in my soul we had to euthanize her. That day, an hour after arriving home devastated by the bitter and painful farewell, I received the Marro box. Honestly I couldn't even look at it. With tears in my eyes I wrote to customer service explaining the situation and asking if I could return the product.  The next day they replied that I could not return the product as it was prepared food but that they would give me a full refund of my money and that I could use the food as I saw fit, even donating it to someone in need (which I did). I was grateful for the gesture of the Marro team and I honestly thought that was it when, to my surprise, last Thursday I received a box in the mail. When I opened it I found a card of condolences and a very pretty yellow rose plant. I immediately started crying like a little girl. How is it possible that a company that doesn't know me yet, since I wasn't even a regular customer but was "trying" the product, took the trouble to choose some roses, write a card and send it to my house? That, ladies and gentlemen, says a lot and if in the future I have a cat again, I won't hesitate for a second to order the product again.
MILLION THANKS Narro!  For now, that little plant has become my new companion and has somehow managed to give me peace and comfort in the moments when I miss my precious little doll, my beloved old lady, my kitty Mambrú the most.
I wish I was able to post some picures but unfortunately I can't.
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars due to Marro's exceptional customer service, empathy, and kindness shown during a difficult personal situation, exceeding their expectations with a refund and a heartfelt condolence gift.

reviews.title: Charlie loves Marro
reviews.review_text: Charlie gives Marro 5 stars. The customer service from Marro is second to none, friendly and so helpful. I didn't even have to tempt Charlie with the pork and beef (he can't have the poultry as he has allergies) as he wolfed it down straight away. I haven't seen him do the zoomies for quite a while being a senior but recently he's been running round like a kitten. He also loves his free toy. At last a cat food with a difference.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars due to Marro's exceptional customer service and the significant improvement in their senior cat's energy and overall health after switching to Marro's food.

reviews.title: Great Service and excellent food
reviews.review_text: Just had our second delivery and our cat loves it.  Great service and excellent food for the fat one!
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars due to the great service and excellent food that their cat loves.

reviews.title: My Cassie fell in love from the first…
reviews.review_text: My Cassie fell in love from the first bite, food looks good no fatty bits compared to another i'm using up. Delivery good wrapped well in a bio degradeable fleece stuff and 2 packs of ice. no complaints from either of us.
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because their cat, Cassie, loved the food from the first bite and they were impressed with the quality and eco-friendly packaging.

reviews.title: Normally really fussy, but not with Marro
reviews.review_text: Surprisingly my rough moggie LOVES Marro cat food. I had tried her previously on Katkin, but she never loved it, and when they changed their recipe and packaginga few months ago she would pick at it and most was thrown away. Well done Marro, you are doing it right and you have gained a happy customer.
reviews.summary: The customer's previously picky cat loves Marro cat food, making them a happy customer after trying other brands that didn't work out.

reviews.title: Rags Loves Marro!
reviews.review_text: Rags, my elderly toothless floof, has loved Marro since I started him on it a couple of weeks ago. He took a few days to get used to the change but now his appetite has improved, he's more energetic and he looks really well. The pouches and deliveries are working great so far and I'd like to pass on my thanks to your rep at the Westmorland Show :blush:
categories: Took a While But Now Love It
Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer's elderly cat took a few days to adjust to Marro food, but now has improved appetite, energy, and overall health, earning a 5-star review.

reviews.title: 3 Happy Cats
reviews.review_text: I have 3 cats, two easy to feed 1 very fussy, tried the trial pack, I now have 3 easy to feed cats  they all love it. Easy to store, easy to prepare. They cannot wait to get their next pack. Thankyou Marro
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their previously fussy cat now loves Marro's food, and all three of their cats eagerly await their next pack.

reviews.title: At last found a food that the fussiest…
reviews.review_text: At last found a food that the fussiest cat in the world enjoys
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because they finally found a cat food that their extremely fussy cat enjoys.

reviews.title: So far, so good!
reviews.review_text:
I can’t recommend Marro enough. My boy, Ishtar, has previously been on KatKin since 2021 and recently, he has started to go off their food. I did some research and came across Marro, and so far, so good! He has eaten two full bowls, both clean since the trial box arrived - looking forward to receiving our first subscription box next week. 

Aside from this, the customer service has been outstanding. I had a very pleasant experience with Tasha when there were some payment issues, and her attention to detail and customer service was extremely personable. Similarly, the packaging was delightful in getting the cats involved, plus the cat toy was an excellent touch. 

Happy to have joined the Marro family!
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their previously fussy cat loves Marro's food and they had an outstanding customer service experience.

reviews.title: Our cat loves the food
reviews.review_text: Our cat loves the food. His coat looks great and he is super happy.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because their cat's coat looks great and they seem happy after eating Marro's food.

reviews.title: Two thumbs up from this polydactyl feline!
reviews.review_text:
My cat Juniper has a very delicate tum and I've tried pretty much every luxury cat food out there! Thankfully, Marro seems to be a hit.

Pros:
- Juniper LOVES it and gobbles it up instantly!
- She hasn't vommitted since she switched to Marro which has been a recurrent issue for months
- It contains psyllium husk, which I had to add to KatKin
- The refer a friend scheme keeps it more affordable: I was very peeved when KatKin stopped theirs!
- Customer service are prompt and helpful
- Cutest. Packaging. Ever!

Cons:
- The portion sizes are very small compared to similar brands
- You can't select portion sizes and flavours online (although I appreciate this function is coming soon)
- The packaging is awkward to open and not recyclable
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro cat food has resolved their cat's recurrent vomiting issue and they appreciate the company's prompt and helpful customer service.

reviews.title: Firstly Charlie the fussy eater loves…
reviews.review_text: Firstly Charlie the fussy eater loves it. The food arrives  in good condition , easy to store . Contacting helpful customer service easy too.  So full marks
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their fussy cat loves the food and they had a positive experience with the company's customer service.

reviews.title: My cat Kasha is elderly and extremely…
reviews.review_text: My cat Kasha is elderly and extremely fussy and has been losing weight. She absolutely loves Marro and is now eating it exclusively and clearing her plate, which is unheard of. The quality of the food seems to be extremely good, I pop it in the microwave on defrost for 10 seconds to warm it up and she seems to appreciate this. I ran out after the starter box and Kasha was most upset! Luckily customer service is second to none and they pulled out all the stops to get me my next delivery. Can’t recommend highly enough!
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's high-quality food has improved their elderly and fussy cat's eating habits and overall health, with exceptional customer service to boot.

reviews.title: Paws up from M&S!
reviews.review_text: Meg in particular LOVES her Marro options for dinner - she's even started becoming fussy with other food options! Sonny is a bit more particular with his choosing - he might like it today but not tomorrow, so who knows!! Meg also loves snuggling down on the packaging that her delivery all comes in!
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their cat, Meg, loves Marro food so much that she's become fussy with other options, and the reviewer finds the delivery packaging to be a bonus comfort for their pet.

reviews.title: Scrummy food with a flexible subscription
reviews.review_text: I've always wanted to try fresh cat food but the size of similar brand's portions put me off- I just don't have the freezer space for large trays! These pouches are much easier to store away. The box is a work of art in itself and the free mouse toy and spork was much appreciated. I hadn't even removed the ice packs when one of my cats was in the box, and she ended up having a lovely long nap on top of the wool used for padding and insulation. Once she was finally out I popped out the window and door which again is just remarkably well thought out. Now, onto the food. The positive is that my fusspot cat LOVES this food. She's never been a great eater, but she devours Marro. One pouch I didn't take out of the freezer early enough and was going to heat up, but she was so desperate for it she happily ate it cold. The one negative- her brother, who normally eats anything, was so taken with Marro that he's turned his nose up at several meals since! I won't be feeding Marro all the time as I prefer to feed a variety of foods and the cost and storage space would be an issue with two cats. It's a great addition to their diet however and I really appreciate that you have the option of buying smaller pouches to feed alongside other cat foods.
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because their normally fussy cat loves Marro's food, devouring it eagerly, and they appreciate the convenient packaging and high-quality ingredients.

reviews.title: My cat slows down eating and her coat…
reviews.review_text: My cat slows down eating and her coat is very shiny.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because their cat's coat became shiny after eating Marro cat food, indicating a positive impact on their cat's health and appearance.

reviews.title: My beautiful black cat smudge became…
reviews.review_text:
My beautiful black cat smudge became ill at 6 months old. We thought we would lose her.
Being off her regular cat food I found out from my dog supplier Butternut dog food about Marro their sister company, I them a try and with in two days smudge was back to her normal self. I tried to get back on her usual food, however she pushed away and meowed at the fridge where her Marro food is.
The freshness and beautiful house you can build the dream home with the box. Nothing can compare to a snuggle of a purrrfect happy :smiley_cat:.
categories: Changed My Cat's Life / Health Benefits
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars because Marro's cat food helped their ill cat recover within two days and the cat now prefers it over their previous food.

reviews.title: Marro has great service
reviews.review_text: Marro has great service, everything arrives on time, perfectly packaged. The sachets are composed with extreme care and the food smells so good that I would love to eat it myself.
reviews.summary: The reviewer gave 5 stars due to Marro's great service, timely and well-packaged deliveries, and high-quality food with appealing composition and smell.

reviews.title: My cats love this food
reviews.review_text:
My cats love this food, their favourite being beef and pork. It looks very good meat and it's great to see no wastage.
When I've contacted customer support for any queries, they've always been very helpful and quick to respond.
reviews.summary: The customer gave 5 stars because their cats love the high-quality meat in Marro's food and they received excellent customer support.
